title: Second tanker in three months hijacked off Yemen by suspected Somali pirates
english: A tanker named MT Astana has been hijacked by armed men in the Gulf of Aden near the coast of Yemen. Somali security officials confirmed that the attackers originated from the Puntland region, marking the second such incident in this area in just three months. This resurgence of piracy in the Gulf of Aden is concerning, especially as the region receives less naval security compared to the nearby Indian Ocean.
amharic: ኤምቲ አስታና የተባለ የነዳጅ ማመላለሻ መርከብ በየመን የባህር ዳርቻ አቅራቢያ በሚገኘው ኤደን ባሕረ ሰላጤ በታጠቁ ሰዎች ታግቷል። የሶማሊያ የጸጥታ ባለስልጣናት እንደገለጹት ጥቃቱን የፈጸሙት ከፑንትላንድ ክልል የተነሱ ሰዎች ሲሆኑ፣ ይህም በአካባቢው በሶስት ወራት ውስጥ የተከሰተ ሁለተኛው ተመሳሳይ የጠለፋ ድርጊት ነው። በአካባቢው የባህር ላይ ወንበዴነት ዳግም መከሰቱ አሳሳቢ ሆኗል፣ ይህም በከፊል ከአካባቢው ደካማ የባህር ኃይል ጥበቃ ጋር የተያያዘ ነው ተብሏል።
oromo: Markabni boba'aa 'MT Astana' jedhamu tokko Galaana Eeden, qarqara biyya Yamanitti humnoota hidhataniin butameera. Aangoonni nageenyaa Somaaliyaa akka ibsanitti, shakkamtoonni kunneen naannoo Puntlaandii irraa kan dhufan yoo ta'u, kunis ji'oota sadan darban keessatti naannicha keessatti yeroo lammaffaaf gosa weerara akkanaa kan mudatedha. Hojiin saaminsa galaanaa kun naannicha keessatti irra deebi'ee mudachuun isaa kan yaaddessu yoo ta'u, gariin isaa ammoo naannicha keessatti eegumsi humna galaanaa hir'achuu isaatiin walqabata.

title: Air conditioner sparked deadly blaze at children's orphanage - police
english: A tragic fire at an orphanage in Algeria's capital, Algiers, resulted in the deaths of 11 people, including children and a staff member. Police investigators determined that the blaze was triggered by an electrical issue in an air-conditioning unit that had been running constantly during a severe heatwave. The incident has caused widespread outrage, leading to calls for a formal investigation into potential safety negligence and a nationwide review of fire protection standards in public facilities.
amharic: በአልጄሪያ ዋና ከተማ አልጀርስ በሚገኝ ወላጅ አልባ ህጻናት ማቆያ በደረሰ የእሳት አደጋ የህጻናትን እና የአንድ ሰራተኛን ህይወት ጨምሮ 11 ሰዎች ህይወታቸው አልፏል። የፖሊስ ምርመራ እንደሚያሳየው እሳቱ የተነሳው በከባድ ሙቀት ምክንያት ያለማቋረጥ ይሰራ የነበረው የአየር ማቀዝቀዣ በመበላሸቱ ነው። ይህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት በሀገሪቱ ከፍተኛ ቁጣን ቀስቅሷል፤ የህዝብ ተወካዮችም የደህንነት ጉድለቶች እንዲመረመሩ እና በሁሉም የህዝብ ተቋማት ላይ ጥብቅ የእሳት አደጋ መከላከያ ፍተሻ እንዲደረግ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል።
oromo: Magaalaa guddoo Aljeeriyaa Aljeersitti bakka ijoollee harka qalleeyyii itti guddifamanitti ibidda hamaan ka’een ijoollee fi hojjetaa tokko dabalatee namoonni 11 du’aniiru. Qorannoon poolisii akka mirkaneessetti, ibidichi kan ka’e qilleensa ho’aa cimaa keessa yeroo dheeraaf hojjetaa kan ture maashinii qabbaneessaa (air conditioner) irraa ta’uu ibsameera. Balaan kun biyyattii keessatti aarii guddaa kan uume yoo ta’u, namoonni dhimmi kun qoratamee, hanqinni nageenyaa jiraannaan tarkaanfiin akka fudhatamu fi dhaabbilee uummataa hunda keessatti sirni ittisa ibiddaa akka sakatta’amu gaafachaa jiru.

title: Burnham elected Labour leader, vows new direction for UK
english: Andy Burnham has been officially named the new leader of the UK's Labour Party, positioning him to become the next prime minister. During his victory speech, he expressed a strong commitment to moving away from the political and economic strategies of the past forty years. He promised to introduce a fresh approach to lead the country in a new direction.
amharic: አንዲ በረንሃም የእንግሊዝ ሌበር ፓርቲ አዲሱ መሪ ሆነው የተመረጡ ሲሆን በሚቀጥለው ሳምንት ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው እንደሚሾሙ ይጠበቃል። በመጀመሪያ ንግግራቸውም ባለፉት አርባ ዓመታት ሲከተሏቸው የነበሩትን ያልተሳኩ የፖለቲካ እና የኢኮኖሚ ስልቶች በመተው አዲስ አቅጣጫ እንደሚቀይሱ ቃል ገብተዋል። ለሀገሪቱ የተሻለ ለውጥ ለማምጣትም አዲስ የሥራ አመራር ዘይቤ እንደሚከተሉ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Andii Barnhaam gaggeessaa haaraa paartii Leebar kan biyya Ingiliz ta'uun filatameera, kunis torban dhufu keessa muummicha ministeeraa ta'uuf akka isa dandeessisu ibsameera. Haasaa isaa jalqabaa keessatti, siyaasaa fi dinagdee kutaalee darban keessatti bu'aa hin qabne jijjiiruuf waadaa galeera. Biyyattii gara fuulduraatti tarkaanfachiisuuf karaan haaraa akka qabatu ibseera.

title: Did the US just start a trade war with Brazil?
english: Donald Trump has introduced a 25% tariff on products imported from Brazil, leading to fears of a trade conflict between the two nations. In response, Brazilian officials have signaled their intent to retaliate against these new trade barriers. Experts suggest that this rising economic tension could significantly influence the outcome of upcoming elections in Brazil.
amharic: ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ከብራዚል በሚገቡ ምርቶች ላይ የ25 በመቶ ቀረጥ መጣላቸው በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል የንግድ ጦርነት ሊቀሰቀስ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ብራዚልም ለዚህ ውሳኔ አጸፋዊ እርምጃ እንደምትወስድ አስታውቃለች። ይህ የኢኮኖሚ ውጥረት በብራዚል የውስጥ ፖለቲካ እና መጪው ምርጫ ላይ ተጽዕኖ ሊያሳድር እንደሚችል ባለሙያዎች ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Donald Trump meeshaalee biyya Brazil irraa gara Ameerikaa galan irratti gibira 25% ta'e erga kaa'ee booda, biyyoota lamaan gidduutti waraanni daldalaa akka uumamu sodaan jira. Mootummaan Brazilis murtee kana irratti haaloo ba'uuf qophii ta'uu ishee ibsiteetti. Hayyoonni akka jedhanitti, dhiibbaan diinagdee kun filannoo biyyattii keessatti dhiibbaa guddaa qabaachuu danda'a.

title: Iranian forces: missiles and drones fired at US targets in Gulf States
english: Iranian military forces have launched a significant retaliatory attack against American targets located across several Gulf nations. This escalation follows an overnight United States strike inside Iranian territory that resulted in the deaths of at least eight individuals. This development marks the most serious increase in regional tensions since a mutual agreement was established between the parties in mid-June.
amharic: የኢራን ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በተለያዩ የባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ኢላማዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በኢራን ግዛት ውስጥ በአሜሪካ በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ቢያንስ ስምንት ሰዎች ከተገደሉ በኋላ ነው። ይህ ክስተት ሰኔ 17 ቀን ከተደረሰው ስምምነት በኋላ በክልሉ የታየው እጅግ አደገኛ የሆነ የቀውስ መባባስ ነው።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Iraan biyyoota Gulf jedhaman keessa kan argaman kaayyoo Ameerikaa irratti haleellaa cimaa raawwataniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe erga Ameerikaan biyya Iraan keessatti haleellaa ganama sa'aatii keessa raawwattee namoota saddeet ajjeestee booda dha. Haalli kun erga waliigalteen ji'a Waxabajjii keessa mallatteeffamee as, walitti bu'iinsa naannichaa keessatti kan hammaate ta'uu ibsameera.

title: Apple regains top spot as world’s most valuable company
english: Apple has once again become the world's most valuable company, reaching a market valuation of $4.88 trillion and narrowly surpassing Nvidia. This shift follows a recent decline in Nvidia's stock and growing investor confidence in Apple's ability to monetize artificial intelligence through its new Siri features. Meanwhile, the company is preparing for a leadership transition as CEO Tim Cook plans to hand over control to John Ternus in September.
amharic: አፕል የ4.88 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የገበያ ዋጋ በመድረስ እንደገና የአለማችን ተፅዕኖ ፈጣሪ እና ዋጋ ያለው ኩባንያ ሆኗል። ይህ እድገት የተመዘገበው የኤንቪዲያ የገበያ ዋጋ በትንሹ በመቀነሱ እና ባለሃብቶች አፕል አዲሱን የሲሪ (Siri) ሰው ሰራሽ አስተውሎት ቴክኖሎጂውን በመጠቀም ገቢ ለማግኘት ባለው አቅም ላይ እምነት በመጣላቸው ነው። በሌላ በኩል ኩባንያው የረጅም ጊዜ ዋና ስራ አስኪያጁ ቲም ኩክ ስልጣናቸውን ለጆን ተርነስ በሴፕቴምበር ወር እንደሚያስረክቡ አስታውቋል።
oromo: Apple gatii gabaa tiriliyoona 4.88 ga'uun ammas dhaabbata addunyaa irratti gatii guddaa qabu ta'eera. Jijjiiramni kun kan dhufe gatiin gabaa Nvidia xiqqoo gad bu'uu fi abbootiin qabeenyaa dandeettii Apple teeknoolojii Siri haaraa fayyadamuun bu'aa argachuuf qabu irratti amantii waan horataniif. Gammachuu kanaan walqabatee, Apple gaggeessaan isaanii Tim Cook ji'a Fulbaana keessa aangoo isaanii gara John Ternus tti dabarsuuf qophiirra jiraachuu beeksiseera.

title: Amazon’s Zoox recalls self-driving vehicles amid emergency response issues
english: Amazon’s autonomous vehicle subsidiary, Zoox, is recalling its fleet of 105 robotaxis due to safety concerns regarding their interaction with emergency scenes. The decision follows reports that these vehicles struggle to identify heavy smoke, occasionally entering fire sites and obstructing first responders. To fix this, the company is deploying a software update designed to better detect hazardous conditions and respond appropriately to emergency operations.
amharic: የአማዞን ንዑስ ኩባንያ የሆነው ዙክስ (Zoox)፣ በድንገተኛ አደጋ ወቅት የሚያሳዩትን የደህንነት ችግር ተከትሎ 105 የሚሆኑ አውቶማቲክ ተሽከርካሪዎቹን እያስታወሰ ነው። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው ተሽከርካሪዎቹ በቦታው ላይ ያለውን ጥቅጥቅ ያለ ጭስ ባለመለየት የእሳት አደጋ መከላከያ ሰራተኞችን ስራ በማስተጓጎላቸው ነው። ኩባንያው ችግሩን ለመቅረፍ ተሽከርካሪዎቹ አደገኛ ሁኔታዎችን በተሻለ መንገድ እንዲለዩ የሚያግዝ የሶፍትዌር ማሻሻያ እያዘጋጀ ይገኛል።
oromo: Dameen dhaabbata Amazon kan ta’e Zoox, konkolaattoonni ofiin of oofan 105 ta’an rakkoo nageenyaa yeroo gargaarsa ariifachiisaa mudatu hordofee akka deebi’an murteesseera. Murtoon kun kan dhufe konkolaattoonni kunneen aara baay'ee jiru addaan baasuu dadhabuun isaanii fi yeroo gargaarsi ariifachiisaan barbaadamu akka gufuutti dhaabbachuu isaanii hordofee dha. Rakkoo kana furuuf, dhaabbatichi software haarawaa konkolaattoonni kunneen haala balaa fi qulqullina aaraa akka sirriitti hubatan gargaaruu danda'u diriirsuuf karoorfateera.

title: Pakistan cricketer Nawaz sanctioned after cannabis-related positive test
english: Pakistan cricket player Mohammad Nawaz has received a three-month suspension from the ICC after testing positive for a cannabis-related substance. Nawaz acknowledged the violation but clarified that the substance was used outside of competition and did not improve his sporting performance. Consequently, his match results from February through May have been disqualified, though he may return sooner by completing a rehabilitation program.
amharic: የፓኪስታኑ ክሪኬት ተጫዋች መሐመድ ናዋዝ ከካናቢስ ጋር የተያያዘ ንጥረ ነገር በደሙ ውስጥ በመገኘቱ የአለም አቀፍ የክሪኬት ምክር ቤት የሶስት ወር እገዳ ጥሎበታል። ተጫዋቹ ጥፋቱን አምኖ ቢቀበልም፣ ንጥረ ነገሩን የተጠቀመው ከውድድር ውጪ እና ለስፖርታዊ ብቃት ማሳደጊያ እንዳልሆነ አስረድቷል። በዚህም ምክንያት ከየካቲት እስከ ግንቦት ባለው ጊዜ የነበሩት የጨዋታ ውጤቶቹ የተሰረዙ ሲሆን፣ ተሃድሶ ፕሮግራም በማጠናቀቅ ወደ ስራው በፍጥነት መመለስ ይችላል።
oromo: Taphatoon kirikeetii Paakistaan Mohaammad Nawaaz qorannoo fayyaa irratti qoricha 'kanaabisiin' walqabatu argamuun isaa erga mirkanaa'ee booda, gamtaan kirikeetii adunyaa ji'a sadiif isa dhorkeera. Nawaaz badii isaa kan amane yoo ta'u, qorichicha kan fayyadame tapha ala fi guddina qophii isaa irratti dhiibbaa uumuuf akka hin taane ibseera. Bu'aan tapha isaa ji'a Guraandhalaa hanga Caamsaa ture kan haqame yoo ta'u, sagantaa deebisanii dhaabuu xumuruun gara taphaatti deebi'uu danda'a.

title: Israeli attacks on Gaza kill 14, including mourners attending funeral
english: Israeli military operations across Gaza have resulted in the deaths of at least 14 Palestinians, with many others injured. A significant drone strike specifically targeted a funeral procession for a victim of an earlier attack, highlighting ongoing violations of the ceasefire. Despite an official truce, reports indicate that Israeli aggression in the region has actually intensified over the past few months.
amharic: በጋዛ በተፈጸመ ተከታታይ የእስራኤል ጥቃት ቢያንስ 14 ፍልስጤማውያን መገደላቸው እና ቁጥራቸው ያልታወቀ ሰዎች መቁሰላቸው ተዘግቧል። ከሞቱት መካከል አብዛኛዎቹ የቀብር ሥነ-ሥርዓት ላይ በነበሩ ሰዎች ላይ በተፈጸመ የድሮን ጥቃት የተገደሉ ናቸው። በስምምነት ላይ ያለው የተኩስ አቁም ቢኖርም እስራኤል ጥቃቷን አጠናክራ መቀጠሏ አሳሳቢ ሆኗል።
oromo: Humni waraana Israa'el ganda Gaza keessatti haleellaa raawwateen namoonni 14 ol ajjeefamaniiru, hedduunis madaa'aniiru. Haleellaan kunneen keessaa inni guddaan kan raawwatame yeroo namoonni awwaalchaaf walgahanii turanitti yommuu ta'u, kunis waldhabdee jiru kan caalatti hammeesseedha. Waraanni Israa'el walii galtee tasgabii erga mallatteeffamee boodas, haleellaa ishee iddoo gara garaatti itti fufuun ishee gabaafameera.

title: IRGC Navy says ‘zero hour’ approaching for operation against US naval units
english: The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy claims it is monitoring all American military equipment and personnel in the region. Iranian officials have warned that US naval forces are nearing a critical point that could trigger a military operation against them. Tensions remain high as Iran signals its readiness to take action against the American military presence in nearby waters.
amharic: የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይል የባህር ኃይል በአካባቢው ያሉ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሳሪያዎችንና ሰራተኞችን በቁጥጥር ስር እንዳዋለ አስታውቋል። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት የአሜሪካ የባህር ኃይል ክፍሎች በኢራን ኃይሎች ላይ እርምጃ ሊወሰድባቸው ወደሚችል ወሳኝ ወቅት እየተቃረቡ መሆኑን አስጠንቅቀዋል። በአካባቢው ባሉ ውሀዎች ውስጥ የአሜሪካን ወታደራዊ መገኘት ለመቃወም ኢራን ዝግጁ መሆኗን እየገለፀች ነው።
oromo: Raayyaan Ittisa Biyyaa Iraan kan IRGC jedhamu, meeshaalee waraanaa fi humnoota Ameerikaa naannichatti argaman hunda to’annoo isaa jala oolchuu isaa beeksiseera. Hojjettoonni mootummaa Iraan humnoonni galaanaa Ameerikaa tarkaanfii waraanaa irratti fudhatamuu danda'uuf gara yeroo murteessaatti dhihaachaa jiraachuu akeekkachiisaniiru. Iraan naannoo sana keessatti iddoo waraanni Ameerikaa jiru irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuuf qophiidha jechuun ibsiteetti.

title: Palestine Action defendant ‘missed the last year’ of his mother’s life while behind bars
english: William Plastow, a defendant involved in an arms factory protest, recently shared that he was imprisoned for 18 months while awaiting trial. During this period, his mother passed away from terminal cancer, causing him to miss her final year. He was eventually granted temporary release on compassionate grounds to be with her during her very last days.
amharic: በጦር መሣሪያ ፋብሪካ ተቃውሞ የተሳተፈው ዊሊያም ፕላስቶው፣ በችሎት ውሳኔ እየጠበቀ በነበረበት ወቅት ለ18 ወራት ታስሮ እንደነበር ተናግሯል። በዚህ ጊዜ ውስጥ እናቱ በጠና ታመው ሕይወታቸው በማለፉ፣ የኋለኛውን አንድ ዓመት ከእሳቸው ጋር ማሳለፍ አልቻለም። በመጨረሻም የጤና ሁኔታቸውን ከግምት በማስገባት የተፈቀደለት ጊዜ፣ የእናቱን የመጨረሻ አራት ቀናት ከጎናቸው እንዲያሳልፍ አስችሎታል።
oromo: William Plastow jedhamu inni warshaa meeshaa waraanaa irratti hiriira ba'e jedhamee himatame, ji'a 18 guutuu mana hidhaa keessa turuun isaa ibsameera. Yeroo kana keessa haati isaa dhukkuba kansaariin du'uudhaan, waggaa isa dhumaa haadha isaa bira ta'uu hin dandeenye. Dhumarrattis, haala isaa hubatanii guyyoota afran haadha isaa jiran bira akka ga'uuf hayyama argateera.

title: US military says it destroyed Iranian port surveillance tower
english: The United States military reported that it successfully destroyed an Iranian surveillance tower located at the Chabahar Shahid Kalantari Port on Thursday. According to US Central Command, the structure was part of a network used by the Iranian Revolutionary Guard to monitor and threaten commercial ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz. This action was taken to disrupt efforts to track vessels in the Gulf of Oman region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል ባለፈው ሐሙስ በኢራን የቻባሃር ሻሂድ ካላንታሪ ወደብ ላይ የሚገኝ የክትትል ግንብ ማውደሙን አስታውቋል። የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ እንደገለጸው፣ ይህ ግንብ የኢራን አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይሎች በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የሚያልፉ የንግድ መርከቦችን ለመከታተል ይጠቀሙበት የነበረ የክትትል መረብ አካል ነበር። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በኦማን ባህረ ሰላጤ አካባቢ የሚደረገውን የመርከቦች ክትትል ለማስተጓጎል ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Amerikaa torban darbe guyyaa Kamisaa buufata Chabahar Shahid Kalantari keessatti gamoowwan waan tokko hordofuuf tajaajilu tokko akka diige beeksiseera. Ajajni giddugaleessa Amerikaa akka ibsetti, gamoowwan kun humnoota Irraan kan itti fayyadamaa turanidha. Humni kun dooniiwwan daldalaa gara Hormuz deemaniif balaa uumuu fi isaan hordofuuf itti gargaaramaa turan. Tarkaanfiin kunis kallattii galaana Omaan keessatti hordoffii dooniiwwan irratti taasifamu dhaabsisuuf kan fudhatameedha.

title: Why the World Cup final has morphed into a debate on Palestine and Israel
english: The 2026 World Cup final between Spain and Argentina has evolved into a political debate regarding the Israel-Palestine conflict. Many fans are supporting Spain due to Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez’s vocal advocacy for Palestinian statehood and his stance against the war in Gaza. Conversely, some spectators are opposing Argentina because of President Javier Milei’s close political alliance with Israel and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s public support for the team. Consequently, the match is being viewed by many as a symbolic showdown between these opposing international political positions.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል የሚደረግ ጨዋታ ብቻ ሳይሆን በእስራኤል እና ፍልስጤም ግጭት ዙሪያ ትልቅ የፖለቲካ ክርክር መድረክ ሆኗል። ብዙ አድናቂዎች የስፔን ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ፔድሮ ሳንቼዝ ለፍልስጤም ነፃነት ያላቸውን ጠንካራ ድጋፍ በመደገፍ ለስፔን ድምፃቸውን እየሰጡ ነው። በሌላ በኩል፣ የአርጀንቲናው ፕሬዝዳንት ሃቪየር ሚሌይ ከእስራኤል ጋር ያላቸው የጠበቀ ግንኙነት እና የጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ ለቡድኑ ያላቸው ድጋፍ ብዙዎችን አሳዝኗል። በዚህም ምክንያት፣ ይህ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በሁለቱ ሀገራት የፖለቲካ አቋም መካከል የሚደረግ ምሳሌያዊ ውጊያ ተደርጎ እየታየ ነው።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti godhamu, tapha kubbaa miilaa qofa osoo hin taane, walitti bu'iinsa Israa'elii fi Falasxiin irratti marii siyaasaa guddaa uumee jira. Hordoftoonni hedduun, Muummeen Ministiraa Ispeen Pedro Sánchez falasxiinotaaf deggersa qaban waan agarsiisaniif, isaanis Ispeeniin deggeruuf murteessaniiru. Gama biraatiin, pirezidaantiin Arjantiinaa Javier Milei Israa'elii wajjin hariiroo cimaa qabaachuu fi Muummeen Ministiraa Israa'el Benyaamiin Neetaanyaahuun taphattoota Arjantiinaa deggeruun isaanii hordoftoota tokko tokko biratti mormii kaasee jira. Kanaafuu, taphi kun akka walitti bu'iinsa siyaasaa kanatti fudhatamee ilaalamaa jira.

title: No US troops in the region recently killed or captured, Centcom says
english: The U.S. military command has officially rejected allegations from Iran that its forces attacked a base in Syria and caused American casualties. Centcom clarified that no U.S. soldiers in the region have been harmed or taken captive. The military described these reports as completely false.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ዕዝ ኢራን በሶሪያ በሚገኝ የአሜሪካ ቤዝ ላይ ጥቃት በማድረስ ወታደሮችን ገድለናል ወይም ማርከናል በማለት ያቀረበችውን ክስ በይፋ አስተባብሏል። የሴንትኮም (Centcom) መግለጫ እንደሚያሳየው በክልሉ ውስጥ ምንም አይነት የአሜሪካ ወታደር አልተገደለም ወይም አልተማረከም። ወታደራዊው ተቋም እነዚህን የተሰራጩ መረጃዎች ፍጹም ሐሰት እንደሆኑ ገልጿል።
oromo: Ajajni waraana Ameerikaa himata Iraan, buufata Siiriyaa keessa jiru irratti haleellaa raawwannee waraana Ameerikaa ajjeesne ykn qabanne jechuun dhiheessite guutummaatti haaleera. Centcom akka ibsetti, naannichatti waraanni Ameerikaa tokkollee kan miidhame ykn kan booji'ame hin jiru. Waraanni Ameerikaa oduun kun dhugaa akka hin taane ibseera.

title: ‘They took our toilet’: How a settlement has squeezed a Palestinian village
english: In the West Bank village of Umm al-Khair, an illegal Israeli outpost has been established right next to the home of the al-Hathaleen family. This expansion has effectively blocked the family from accessing their own land, including the livestock enclosure they depend on for their livelihood. As a result, the family frequently struggles to feed and care for their animals, leaving them in a constant state of uncertainty about their survival and daily life.
amharic: በምዕራብ ባንክ ኡም አል-ኻየር መንደር ውስጥ ህገ-ወጥ የእስራኤል ሰፈራ በአል-ሃታሌን ቤተሰብ ቤት አጠገብ ተቋቁሟል። ይህ መስፋፋት ቤተሰቡ የራሳቸውን መሬት እና የኑሮ መሠረት የሆነውን የከብቶች ማቆያ እንዳይጠቀሙ አግዷቸዋል። በዚህም ምክንያት ቤተሰቡ እንስሳቸውን ለመመገብና ለመንከባከብ ከፍተኛ ችግር ውስጥ የገቡ ሲሆን የዕለት ተዕለት ኑሯቸውም ለከፍተኛ ስጋት ተጋልጧል።
oromo: Godinaa Lixaa Baankii keessatti, baadiyaa Umm al-Khair jedhamtu keessatti, qubannaan Israa'el seeraan alaa ta'e tokko mana maatii Al-Hathaleen cinaatti ijaarameera. Babal'inni kun maatiin kun lafa isaanii fi iddoo horiin isaanii itti oolu akka hin fayyadamne dhorkeera. Kanaan kan ka'es, maatiin sun beeylada isaanii nyaachisuu fi kunuunsuudhaaf rakkachaa jiru, akkasumas jireenyi isaanii guyyuu rakkoo fi sodaa keessa galeera.

title: Plainclothes ICE agents manhandle man during arrest attempt
english: A video recently captured two undercover ICE officers aggressively detaining a man at the Las Vegas airport, which sparked public outrage and intervention from bystanders. Following the incident, the agency clarified that the man was ultimately taken into custody at a different airport in Los Angeles for violating his visa terms. This event has led to renewed scrutiny regarding the methods used by the agency during their arrest operations.
amharic: በላስ ቬጋስ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ በሲቪል ልብስ የለበሱ ሁለት የኢሚግሬሽን እና የጉምሩክ ማስፈጸሚያ (ICE) ወኪሎች አንድን ሰው በኃይል ለመያዝ ሲሞክሩ የሚያሳይ ቪዲዮ ከፍተኛ ትችት አስነስቷል። ተሰብሳቢዎች ጣልቃ በመግባታቸው ወኪሎቹ እሱን ሳይዙት ሄደው ነበር። በኋላም ኤጀንሲው ግለሰቡ በሎስ አንጀለስ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ በቪዛ ጊዜ ማለፊያ ምክንያት በቁጥጥር ስር እንደዋለ አስታውቋል። ይህ ክስተት በኤጀንሲው የአያያዝ ስልቶች ላይ ያለውን ስጋት ዳግም አቀጣጥሏል።
oromo: Viidiyoon buufata xiyyaaraa Laas Veegasitti namoota uffata idilee uffatanii jiran lamaan garee ICE irraa ta'an namicha tokko humnaan qabachuu yaalan agarsiisu mormii uumee jira. Namoonni naannichatti argaman gidduu seenuudhaan namicha gargaaruun isaanii dhaabbatichi qabannicha akka dhiisu godhee ture. Boodarras, ICE namichi kun viizaa isaa darbuudhaan kan mirkanaa'eefi buufata xiyyaaraa Los Anjelesitti akka qabame ibsee jira. Ta'een kun adeemsa qabxii isaanitti fayyadamanii fi haala hojii garee kanaa irratti komii guddaa kaasee jira.

title: Ukraine suffers port attacks as protests persist over defence shake-up
english: Ukraine suffers port attacks as protests persist over defence shake-up

title: France vs England – World Cup third-place playoff: Prediction, kickoff
english: France and England are set to face off in the FIFA World Cup third-place playoff at Miami Stadium this Saturday after both teams lost their respective semifinal matches. This game serves as the final match for France's long-serving manager Didier Deschamps, marking the end of his distinguished 14-year tenure. Additionally, French star Kylian Mbappe will be looking to secure the Golden Boot award as he competes against Lionel Messi for the tournament's top scorer title.
amharic: በፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍጻሜ የተሸነፉት ፈረንሳይ እና እንግሊዝ ለሦስተኛ ደረጃ የሚደረገውን ጨዋታ ቅዳሜ በሚያሚ ስታዲየም ያደርጋሉ። ይህ ጨዋታ የፈረንሳይ ብሔራዊ ቡድን አሰልጣኝ የሆኑት ዲዲዬ ዴሻምፕ ለ14 ዓመታት የቆዩበትን የስራ ዘመን የሚጨርሱበት የመጨረሻ ጨዋታ ይሆናል። በሌላ በኩል የፈረንሳይ ኮከብ ተጫዋች ኪሊያን ኤምባፔ የውድድሩ ከፍተኛ ጎል አስቆጣሪ በመሆን የጎልደን ቡት ሽልማትን ለማግኘት ይፋለማል።
oromo: Faransaayifi Ingiliiz tapha gubbaa seemi-fayinaalitti erga injifatanii booda, Wiixata kana buufata miyaamiitti tapha sadarkaa sadaffaa qabachuuf wal morkatu. Taphi kun leenjisaa garee Faransaay kan ta'an Didiyee Deeshaampiifi tajaajila waggaa 14 booda tapha isa dhumaa ta'a. Gama biraatiin, taphataan kutaaleen Faransaay Kiliiyaan Embaapee badhaasa kophee warqee (Golden Boot) argachuuf Lionel Meesii waliin morkii cimaa keessa jira.

title: Uganda school bus crash kills 20 children and 1 adult
english: A tragic bus accident in eastern Uganda claimed the lives of 20 schoolchildren and one adult, who is believed to be the school's founder, while many others remain hospitalized with injuries. The vehicle crashed while returning to Kampala from a field trip after the driver reportedly lost control and hit a rock. In response to this disaster, the Ugandan government has immediately suspended all school-related excursions across the country until further notice.
amharic: በምስራቅ ዩጋንዳ በተከሰተ አሳዛኝ የአውቶቡስ አደጋ 20 ተማሪዎች እና አንድ የትምህርት ቤቱ መስራች እንደሆኑ የሚታመኑ አዋቂ ህይወታቸው አልፏል፤ ሌሎች በርካታ ተማሪዎችም ጉዳት ደርሶባቸው ሆስፒታል ይገኛሉ። አውቶቡሱ ከጉዞ መልስ ወደ ካምፓላ እየተመለሰ ሳለ ሾፌሩ በመቆጣጠሪያው ምክንያት አደጋው ሊደርስ ችሏል። ይህንን ተከትሎ የዩጋንዳ መንግስት እስከ ሌላ ጊዜ ድረስ ሁሉም አይነት የትምህርት ቤት ጉዞዎች እንዲቆሙ ትዕዛዝ አስተላልፏል።
oromo: Ugandaa bahaatti balaa konkolaataa mudateen barattoonni 20 fi namni guddaan tokko lubbuun darbaniiru, namoonni biroo hedduunis miidhamanii hospitaala galaniiru. Konkolaataan kun imala barnootaa booda gara magaalaa Kampalaa deebi'aa osoo jiruu, darabaan to'annoo dhabee dhagaa rukutuun isaa gabaafameera. Balaa kana hordofee, mootummaan Ugandaa imalli mana barnootaa kamiyyuu hanga beeksisni biraa kennamutti akka dhaabatu ajajeera.

title: Starmer was a fabricator and a fraud. Good riddance
english: Outgoing British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has faced harsh criticism for making false claims during his final days in office. Critics, including his predecessor Jeremy Corbyn, argue that Starmer lied about the party being institutionally antisemitic and financially bankrupt during the previous leadership. These accusations are seen as a desperate attempt by Starmer to protect his own legacy after losing the support of his parliamentary colleagues.
amharic: የብሪታኒያው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ኬይር ስታርመር በስልጣን ዘመናቸው የመጨረሻ ቀናት ላይ ሀሰተኛ መረጃዎችን በማሰራጨት ከፍተኛ ትችት ገጥሟቸዋል። የቀድሞው የፓርቲው መሪ ጄረሚ ኮርቢንን ጨምሮ በርካታ ተቺዎች ስታርመር ፓርቲው በነበሩበት ወቅት ተቋማዊ የፀረ-ሴማዊነት እና የገንዘብ ችግር እንደነበረው ተናግረዋል ያሉት ውንጀላ ሀሰት መሆኑን ይገልጻሉ። እነዚህ መግለጫዎች የራሳቸውን ስም ለመገንባት እና የፓርቲ አባላትን አመኔታ ለማግኘት የታለሙ ውሸቶች እንደሆኑ ተወስቷል።
oromo: Mummichi ministeeraa biyya Ingiliz kan ta'an Keir Starmer yeroo isaanii isa dhumaa irratti odeeffannoo dhugaarraa fagaate fayyadamuun isaanii qeeqa cimaa guddaa irra buuseera. Hoggantuu duraanii Jeremy Corbyn dabalatee, qaamoleen hedduun Starmer yeroo duraanii sana paartiin isaanii rakkoo qorannoo siyaasaa fi dinagdee keessa ture jechuun isaanii soba ta'uu dubbatu. Starmer gocha kana kan raawwatan, hojii isaanii irratti amanamummaa argachuu fi seenaa isaanii gaarii fakkeessuuf akka ta'e himameera.

title: Moroccan whistleblower reveals how Rabat used Israel's Pegasus spyware for surveillance
english: A former Moroccan intelligence official has confirmed that the government utilized Israeli-made Pegasus spyware to monitor journalists, activists, and international figures. This revelation follows a collaborative investigation by various media groups and human rights organizations that previously linked Morocco to such surveillance activities. Despite Rabat's earlier denials, these new disclosures provide further evidence regarding the state's involvement in digital espionage.
amharic: የሞሮኮ የቀድሞ የስለላ ድርጅት ባለስልጣን መንግስታቸው ጋዜጠኞችን፣ የመብት ተሟጋቾችን እና የውጭ ሀገር ባለስልጣናትን ለመሰለል በእስራኤል የተሰራውን የፔጋሰስ ሶፍትዌር እንደተጠቀመ አረጋግጠዋል። ይህ መረጃ ይፋ የሆነው በተለያዩ የመገናኛ ብዙሃን እና የሰብአዊ መብት ተቋማት በተደረገ ጥናት ነው። ሞሮኮ ቀደም ሲል ክሱ ውድቅ አድርጋ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ አዲሱ ማስረጃ መንግስት በዲጂታል የስለላ ስራዎች ውስጥ እጁ እንዳለበት ያሳያል።
oromo: Hojjetaan qorannoo icciitii kan duraanii kan biyya Morokkoo, mootummaan isaanii gargaarsawwan isiraa'elii kan 'Pegasus' jedhaman fayyadamuun gaazexeessitoota, falmitoota mirga namoomaa fi namoota biyya alaa hordofaa akka ture mirkaneesseera. Icciitiin kun kan ba'e qorannoo dhaabbilee miidiyaa fi mirga namoomaa adda addaatiin erga taasifame boodadha. Mootummaan Morokkoo kanaan dura himannaa kana haalaa tureyyuu, ragaan haaraan kun mootummaan sun hojii hordoffii dijitaalaa keessatti hirmaachuu isaa agarsiisa.

title: Moroccan whistleblower reveals how Rabat used Israel's Pegasus spyware for surveillance
english: A former Moroccan intelligence officer has confirmed that his government used Israeli-made Pegasus spyware to monitor journalists, activists, and foreign officials. The whistleblower revealed that the high-priced software was likely gifted to Morocco by the UAE and served as a final resort for the intelligence services. These findings are supported by a collaborative international investigation that includes leaked data and internal records.
amharic: የሞሮኮ የቀድሞ የደህንነት መኮንን መንግስታቸው ጋዜጠኞችን፣ አክቲቪስቶችን እና የውጭ አገር ባለስልጣናትን ለመሰለል በእስራኤል የተሰራውን 'ፔጋሰስ' የተሰኘ የስለላ ሶፍትዌር ይጠቀም እንደነበር አረጋግጠዋል። ጠቋሚው እንዳለው ከሆነ ውድ የሆነው ይህ ሶፍትዌር የተገዛው በተባበሩት አረብ ኢምሬቶች ድጋፍ ሲሆን፣ የሞሮኮ የደህንነት መስሪያ ቤትም እንደ የመጨረሻ አማራጭ ይጠቀምበት ነበር። ይህ መረጃ የወጣው በዓለም አቀፍ የምርመራ ጋዜጠኞች ቡድን በተሰበሰቡ የውስጥ ሰነዶች እና መረጃዎች ነው።
oromo: Hojiin gurguddaan basaastotaa kanaan duraa tokko akka mirkaneessetti, mootummaan Marookoo gosa sagantaa basaasaa 'Pegasus' jedhamu kan Israa'elii hojjetame fayyadamuun gaazexeessitoota, qabsaa'ota mirga namoomaa fi namoota biyya alaa hordofaa ture. Odeeffannoon kun akka ibsutti, sagantaan baay'ee qaaliin kun biyya UAE irraa kennaa ta'ee akka kennameefii fi tajaajilli basaasaa biyyattii tarkaanfii dhumaa godhatanii itti fayyadamus himameera. Ragaaleen kun qorannoo idil-addunyaa irratti hundaa'uun, ragaalee dhokataa turan waliin qindaa'ee ifa baheera.

title: US denies military casualties in Iranian attack on command centre in Syria
english: The United States military has officially refuted claims made by Iran regarding an attack on the al-Tanf base in Syria. American officials stated that reports suggesting their soldiers were killed or captured during this alleged operation are entirely untrue. The U.S. Central Command confirmed that all personnel in the region remain safe and accounted for.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ዕዝ በሶሪያ በሚገኘው አል-ታንፍ የጦር ሰፈር ላይ ጥቃት እንደደረሰ እና ወታደሮች እንደተገደሉ ወይም እንደተያዙ ኢራን ያቀረበችውን ክስ ውድቅ አድርጓል። የአሜሪካ ባለስልጣናት እነዚህ ወሬዎች ፈጽሞ ከእውነት የራቁ መሆናቸውን አስታውቀዋል። በአካባቢው የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ደህና መሆናቸውንም አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Amerikaa, gareen waraana Iraan buufata waraana Suuriyaa kan al-Tanf irratti haleellaa raawwachuufi waraana Amerikaa ajjeesuu ykn qabachuu isaa ibse dhugaa akka hin taane beeksiseera. Amerikaan gabaasawwan kun guutummaatti soba ta'uu fi waraanni ishee naannichatti argaman hundi nagaa akka ta'an mirkaneessiteetti.

title: Israel advances crocodile plan to stop Palestinian prisoners escaping
english: The Israeli government has changed the legal status of Nile crocodiles to allow them to be kept for security purposes. This move follows a proposal to potentially use the reptiles as a barrier around a detention center for Palestinian prisoners. The decision was made by the Environment Minister despite opposition from environmental groups and the ministry's own legal experts.
amharic: የእስራኤል መንግስት የናይል አዞዎችን በደህንነት ስራ ላይ ለማዋል የሚያስችል ህጋዊ ለውጥ አድርጓል። ይህ ውሳኔ ፍልስጤማውያን ታሳሪዎች በሚገኙበት ማረሚያ ቤት ዙሪያ አዞዎችን እንደ መከላከያ አጥር የመጠቀም ሀሳብን ተከትሎ የመጣ ነው። የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ሚኒስትሯ ይህንን እርምጃ የወሰዱት የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ቡድኖች እና የህግ አማካሪዎች ተቃውሞ ቢኖርም ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Israa'el qileensa (crocodiles) naayil fayyadamuu akka danda'uuf seera isaanii jijjiireera. Tarkaanfiin kun hidhamtoota Falasxiin kan itti hidhaman mana hidhaa keessa jiran irratti eegumsa gochuuf jecha kan karoorfame dha. Ministeerri naannoo namoota naannoo fi gorsa seeraa irraa mormiin isaan mudateyyuu, ajaja kanaan akkaataa bofa kanneen itti fayyadamuu danda'an mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Burnham confirmed as leader of UK’s governing Labour Party, headed for PM
english: Andy Burnham has been officially named the new leader of the UK's Labour Party and is set to become prime minister this Monday. He replaces Keir Starmer, who stepped down following declining public support caused by economic difficulties and geopolitical conflicts. As the incoming leader, Burnham aims to unify the country and address the growing political challenge posed by far-right groups.
amharic: አንዲ በርንሃም የእንግሊዝ የሌበር ፓርቲ አዲሱ መሪ ሆነው የተመረጡ ሲሆን ሰኞ ዕለትም ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው ይሾማሉ። እርሳቸው የተተኩት በኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና በአለም አቀፍ ግጭቶች ምክንያት ድጋፋቸው የቀነሰውን ኬይር ስታርመርን ነው። አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሀገሪቱን አንድ ለማድረግ እና በጽንፈኛ የፖለቲካ ቡድኖች እየተፈጠረ ያለውን ተግዳሮት ለመቋቋም እንደሚሰሩ ቃል ገብተዋል።
oromo: Andii Barnhaam geggeessaa haaraa paartii Leebar kan biyya Ingiliiz ta'uun mirkanaa'eera, akkasumas Wiixata dhufu kana muummicha ministeeraa ta'uuf qophiirra jira. Inni kan bakka bu'e Keer Staarmer yoo ta'u, isaanis rakkoo diinagdee fi waldhabdee addunyaa irratti hunda'uudhaan jaalatamummaan isaanii gadi bu'uusaatiin aangoorraa ka'aniiru. Barnhaam biyyattii tokko gochuu fi shoorarkaa gareewwan mirga-fayyoota (far-right) irraa dhufu ittisuuf akka hojjetu waadaa seeneera.

title: China’s Xi Jinping launches new AI alliance: What is it?
english: Chinese President Xi Jinping has introduced the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (WAICO), a coalition of 29 nations aimed at shaping global AI standards. During a technology summit in Shanghai, Xi emphasized that AI development should be a collaborative effort rather than dominated by a single nation, a clear critique of current United States influence. Beijing intends to use this platform to support developing nations and promote an approach to AI that prioritizes human oversight and equitable access.
amharic: የቻይናው ፕሬዝዳንት ዢ ጂንፒንግ የአለም አቀፍ አርቲፊሻል ኢንተለጀንስ የትብብር ድርጅት (WAICO) የተባለ 29 ሀገራት የተሳተፉበትን አዲስ ህብረት ይፋ አድርገዋል። በሻንጋይ በተካሄደው የቴክኖሎጂ ጉባኤ ላይ ፕሬዝዳንቱ አርቲፊሻል ኢንተለጀንስ በአንድ ሀገር የበላይነት ስር መውደቅ እንደሌለበት በመግለጽ የአሜሪካን ተጽዕኖ ተችተዋል። ቤጂንግ ይህንን ህብረት በመጠቀም ለታዳጊ ሀገራት ድጋፍ ለማድረግ እና በሰው ቁጥጥር ስር ያለ የቴክኖሎጂ አጠቃቀምን ለማበረታታት አቅዳለች።
oromo: Pirezidaantiin Chaayinaa Xi Jiinpingi dhaabbata 'World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (WAICO)' jedhamu kan biyyoota 29 of keessatti qabatu ifa godhaniiru. Shaanghaayitti erga dubbatanii booda, teknolojii kanatti fayyadamuu fi hoogganuu irratti biyyi tokko qofa murteessuun akka hin barbaachisne ibsuun, dhiibbaa Ameerikaa irratti qeeqan dhiyeessaniiru. Chaayinaan hariiroo kana fayyadamuun biyyoota guddatutti jiran gargaaruufi teeknoloojiin kun to'annaa namaa jala akka oolu gochuuf karoora akka qaban beekameera.

title: UN urges probe into deaths in Pakistani-administered Kashmir unrest
english: The United Nations human rights chief is calling for an independent investigation into the violent clashes in Pakistani-administered Kashmir that have claimed 31 lives since June. The unrest, fueled by disputes over election seats and economic concerns, has led to a government crackdown on activists and significant internet restrictions. International officials have expressed concern over Pakistan labeling the protest group as a terrorist organization and urged a peaceful resolution to the ongoing conflict.
amharic: የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት የሰብአዊ መብት ኮሚሽነር ከሰኔ ወር ጀምሮ በፓኪስታን አስተዳደር ስር ባለው ካሽሚር ለተከሰተው እና ለ31 ሰዎች ህይወት መጥፋት ምክንያት ለሆነው ግጭት ገለልተኛ ምርመራ እንዲደረግ ጠይቀዋል። የምርጫ መቀመጫዎችን እና የኑሮ ውድነትን በሚመለከት በተነሳው ተቃውሞ ሳቢያ መንግስት በተቃዋሚዎች ላይ የወሰደው እርምጃ እና የኢንተርኔት አገልግሎት መዘጋቱ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ዓለም አቀፍ አካላት ፓኪስታን የተቃውሞ ቡድኑን እንደ አሸባሪ መፈረጇ ተገቢ አለመሆኑን በመግለጽ ጉዳዩ በሰላማዊ መንገድ እንዲፈታ አሳስበዋል።
oromo: Hogganaan mirga namoomaa Dhaabbata Mootummoota Gamtoomanii, naannoo Kaashmir kan Paakistaaniin bulchu keessatti namoota 31 ajjeese kan ta'e walitti bu'iinsa gara jabeessa ta'e irratti qorannoon walaba ta'e akka gaggeeffamu gaafateera. Falmii iddoo filannoo fi rakkoo dinagdee irraa kan ka'e, mootummaan siviilota irratti tarkaanfiin fudhatamee fi intarneetiin dhaabbachuun isaa yaaddoo guddaa uumeera. Dhaabbatichi mootummaan Paakistaan garee siviilotaa kana akka dhaabbata shororkeessaatti ramaduun isaa kan isaan yaaddessu ta'uu fi rakkoon kun nagaadhaan akka furamu waamicha dhiyeessaniiru.

title: Satellite images show damage inside Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant
english: Satellite images from July 7 to 12 reveal new impact marks within Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant complex following recent U.S. military strikes. While local officials confirmed attacks occurred in the surrounding province, they have denied that the reactor itself was damaged. The U.S. military has not officially included the nuclear site in its list of targeted Iranian infrastructure.
amharic: በሳተላይት በተነሱ ምስሎች እንደሚያሳየው በኢራን የቡሼር የኑክሌር ኃይል ማመንጫ ጣቢያ ውስጥ በቅርቡ በተፈጸሙ የአሜሪካ ጥቃቶች ጉዳት ደርሷል። የአካባቢው ባለስልጣናት በአውራጃው ውስጥ ጥቃቶች እንደተፈጸሙ አረጋግጠው የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ የኑክሌር ማዕከሉ ላይ ግን ምንም ጉዳት እንዳልደረሰ ገልጸዋል። የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል የኑክሌር ጣቢያውን በዒላማዎቹ ዝርዝር ውስጥ እንዳላካተተ አስታውቋል።
oromo: Suurri sarara xiyyaaraa (satellite) torban darbe kaafame akka mul'isutti, buufata anniisaa niwukilaraa Bushehr kan Iran keessatti rukuttaa waraana Ameerikaa irraa kan ka'e miidhaan haaraan qaqqabera. Gamtaleen naannichaa naannawa sana keessatti rukuttaan raawwatamuu mirkaneessanillee, buufatni niwukilaraa mataa isaa miidhamuu isaa haalaniiru. Waraanni Ameerikaa gama isaatiin, buufata niwukilaraa kana akka bakka ganamatti (target) hin fayyadamne beeksiseera.

title: Ukraine ‘cuts off’ Crimea from Russia, plunging it into an energy crisis
english: Ukraine has successfully disrupted Russia's ability to supply fuel and energy to Crimea through a strategic drone operation named Molochka. By targeting the tankers and barges that transport oil across the Sea of Azov, Ukraine has paralyzed critical supply routes and caused a severe fuel shortage. Russian officials have admitted that they cannot guarantee regular gasoline distribution, leaving the peninsula in a deepening energy crisis.
amharic: ዩክሬን ሞሎቻካ በተሰኘ ስትራቴጂካዊ የድሮን ዘመቻ አማካይነት ሩሲያ ወደ ክሬሚያ የምታደርሰውን የነዳጅ እና የኃይል አቅርቦት ማስተጓጎል ችላለች። በአዞቭ ባህር በኩል ነዳጅ የሚያጓጉዙ መርከቦችን በማጥቃት የሩሲያን አቅርቦት ያቆመች ሲሆን ይህም በክልሉ ከፍተኛ የነዳጅ እጥረት እንዲፈጠር አድርጓል። የሩሲያ አስተዳዳሪዎች በበኩላቸው ነዳጅን በመደበኛነት ማቅረብ እንደማይችሉ በማመናቸው፣ ክሬሚያ አሁን ከፍተኛ የኃይል ቀውስ ውስጥ ትገኛለች።
oromo: Yukireeniin duula diroonii 'Molochka' jedhamuun, gargaarsa boba'aa fi anniisaa Ruusiyaan gara Kirimiyaatti ergitu guutummaatti addaan kutteetti. Dooniiwwan boba'aa galaana Azoov keessa darban irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuun, daandiiwwan dhiyeessii guddaa waan cufteef, naannichatti hanqinni boba'aa cimaan uumameera. Bulchiitoonni Ruusiyaa boba'aa gahaa ta'e dhiyeessuu akka hin dandeenye waan beeksisaniif, Kirimiyan rakkoo anniisaa hamaa keessa seentee jirti.

title: US marines board commercial tanker in Gulf of Oman
english: United States Marines from the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit recently boarded a commercial tanker named the M/T Wen Yao in the Gulf of Oman. This operation was carried out as part of an ongoing naval blockade against Iran. The military released footage confirming the boarding took place as part of their maritime enforcement efforts.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የባህር ኃይል ወታደሮች በኦማን ባህረ ሰላጤ ውስጥ በሚገኝ የንግድ መርከብ ላይ ተሳፍረዋል። ይህ ድርጊት የተፈጸመው በኢራን ላይ እየተካሄደ ባለው የባህር ላይ እገዳ አካል ሆኖ ነው። ወታደራዊው ክፍል መርከቡን እንደተቆጣጠሩ የሚያሳይ ምስል ለህዝብ ይፋ አድርገዋል።
oromo: Humnooti loltummaa galaanaatti kan Ameerikaa (US Marines) galaana Omaan keessatti doonii daldalaa 'M/T Wen Yao' jedhamtu tokko to'annoo isaanii jala oolchaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun qabeenya Iranirratti taasifamaa jiru kan gufachiisu yoo ta'u, kutaan waraanaa kunis suuraa fi viidiyoo ta'e sana akka ragaatti baaseera.

title: China slams Trump’s claims over 2020 US election interference
english: China has officially rejected accusations made by Donald Trump regarding their alleged involvement in the 2020 United States presidential election. The Chinese government dismissed these claims as entirely false and harmful defamation. They maintain that there is no factual basis for the former president's allegations of interference.
amharic: ቻይና እ.ኤ.አ በ2020 በተካሄደው የአሜሪካ ፕሬዝዳንታዊ ምርጫ ጣልቃ ገብታለች በሚል ዶናልድ ትራምፕ የቀረቡትን ክስ በይፋ አስተባብላለች። የቻይና መንግስት እነዚህን ውንጀላዎች መሰረት ቢስ እና ጎጂ የሆኑ የሀሰት ወሬዎች በማለት ውድቅ አድርጓቸዋል። ሀገሪቱ በቀድሞው ፕሬዝዳንት የቀረበው የጣልቃ ገብነት ክስ ምንም አይነት እውነታ የለውም ብላለች።
oromo: Chaayinaan himata Donald Trump kan bara 2020 filannoo pirezidaantummaa Ameerikaa keessa galtee jetti jedhu guututti mormiteetti. Mootummaan Chaayinaa himata kana soba fi maqaa balleessuu dha jechuun kan ibse yoo ta'u, himanni pirezidaanticha durii kun dhuga-qabeessa miti jedheera.

title: Church of England backs Palestinian Christians despite backlash
english: The Church of England's General Synod has officially voted to support Palestinian Christians by engaging with the Kairos Palestine documents. This move aims to highlight the experiences of Palestinians living under occupation, despite facing significant criticism from Jewish groups. The church maintains that this decision expresses solidarity with non-violent resistance while upholding their commitment to interfaith dialogue.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ ቤተክርስቲያን ጠቅላላ ጉባኤ የካይሮስ ፍልስጤም ሰነዶችን በመቀበል ከፍልስጤማውያን ክርስቲያኖች ጋር እንደሚቆም በይፋ ወስኗል። ይህ ውሳኔ በአይሁድ ቡድኖች ዘንድ ተቃውሞ ቢገጥመውም፣ በወረራ ስር ስላሉ ፍልስጤማውያን መከራ ለመስማት ያለመ ነው። ቤተክርስቲያኗ ይህ ድርጊት ለሰላማዊ ተቃውሞ ድጋፍ የሚሰጥ እና የሃይማኖቶች መግባባትን የሚያጠናክር እንደሆነ አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Mana Kiristaana Ingilizii (Church of England) waraqaa ragaa Kaayiroos Phalastiin jedhamu fudhachuun Kiristaanota Phalastiin waliin akka dhaabbatu murteesseera. Murteen kun mormii gareewwan Ayihudoota biraa isaan mudatus, dhiibbaa jala kan jiran Phalastiinotaa dhaggeeffachuuf kan karoorfame dha. Mana kiristaanittis tarkaanfiin kun mormii nagaa fi marii amantiiwwan gidduu jiru cimsuuf kan godhame ta'uu ibsiteetti.

title: Did China steal 2020 US election data, as Trump claims?
english: Donald Trump recently claimed in a speech that China interfered in the 2020 US election by stealing voter data to manipulate the results. Despite his accusations and the release of declassified documents, these claims contradict previous findings from US intelligence agencies. The president is currently using these assertions to push for stricter federal voter identification laws while managing ongoing diplomatic tensions with China.
amharic: ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በቅርቡ ባደረጉት ንግግር ቻይና የምርጫ ውጤቱን ለመለወጥ የመራጮችን መረጃ በመስረቅ እ.ኤ.አ በ2020 በተካሄደው የአሜሪካ ምርጫ ጣልቃ ገብታለች የሚል ክስ አቅርበዋል። ምንም እንኳን የቀድሞው ፕሬዝዳንት ይህንን ክስ ለመደገፍ አንዳንድ ሰነዶችን ይፋ ቢያደርጉም፣ ክሱ ቀደም ሲል በነበሩ የአሜሪካ የደህንነት ተቋማት ዘገባዎች ውድቅ የተደረገ ነው። ትራምፕ እነዚህን መግለጫዎች ተጠቅመው ጥብቅ የሆነ የመራጮች መታወቂያ ህግ እንዲጸድቅ ግፊት እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Donald Trump guyyaa dhiyoo kana haasaa taasisaniin, Chaayinaan filannoo Ameerikaa bara 2020 keessa bu'aa filannichaa jijjiiruuf jecha ragaa filattootaa hatuun gidduu seenetti jedhaniiru. Prezidaantichi himannaa kana deggeruuf ragaalee garaagaraa baasaniyyuu, gabaasni qorannoo durii kan biyyattii himannaa kana dhugaa ta'uu isaa hin deggaru. Prezidaantichi himannaa kana fayyadamuun seera eenyummaa filattootaa cimsuuf yaalii gochaa jiru.

title: ‘Yuba’ – My dear father
english: Sheikha Al Mayassa reflects on the life and legacy of her father, emphasizing his dedication to Qatar's progress over personal gain. She highlights his unique decision to abdicate power to his son to empower a new generation of leadership. Furthermore, she honors his role as a mentor who encouraged her personal growth and professional ambition without limitations.
amharic: ሼይካ አል ማያሳ ስለ አባቷ የሕይወት ዘመንና ትሩፋት ሲገልጹ፣ ለአገሪቱ እድገት እንጂ ለራሱ ጥቅም ያልኖረ መሪ እንደነበር አስታውሰዋል። ሥልጣኑን ለልጃቸው በማስረከብ አዲሱን ትውልድ ስልጣን ላይ እንዲወጡ ያደረጉበትን ልዩ መንገድ ያደንቃሉ። በተጨማሪም፣ ሴት ልጃቸውን በሙያና በግል ሕይወታቸው እንዲበረታቱ በማድረግ ረገድ የነበራቸውን ታላቅ አስተዋጽኦ ታስታውሳለች።
oromo: Sheekaa Al Maayaasaan waa'ee jireenyaa fi dhaala abbaa ishee yeroo dubbattu, abbaan ishee fedhii dhuunfaa irra biyya ishee Kaataariif dursaa akka kennaa turan ibsiteetti. Aangoo ishee ilma isaatiif gadhiisuun dhaloota haaraa humneessuuf murtoo seenaa qabeessa akka fudhate himteetti. Kana malees, abbaan ishee dubartummaa ishee malee sadarkaa ol'aanaatti akka guddattuufi hojii ishee keessatti daangaa malee akka milkooftu gargaarsisaa akka ture yaadatti.

title: The Church of England has taken a long-overdue step on Palestine
english: The Church of England's General Synod has voted to actively listen to Palestinian Christian perspectives and review its investment policies in line with international legal standards. This decision marks a significant shift in how the Church addresses the Israeli-Palestinian conflict and its own historical responsibilities. While some pro-Israel groups have criticized the move, supporters see it as a necessary step toward promoting truth and justice in the region.
amharic: የእንግሊዝ ቤተክርስቲያን ጠቅላይ ሲኖዶስ የፍልስጤም ክርስቲያኖችን ሃሳብ በቁም ነገር ለመስማት እና የኢንቨስትመንት ፖሊሲዎቿን ከአለም አቀፍ ህግጋት ጋር በማጣጣም ለመገምገም ድምጽ ሰጥቷል። ይህ ውሳኔ ቤተክርስቲያኗ በአይሁድ እና በፍልስጤማውያን ግጭት ዙሪያ የምትይዘውን አቋም እና ታሪካዊ ኃላፊነቷን ለመወጣት የምታደርገው ትልቅ ለውጥ ተደርጎ ተወስዷል። አንዳንድ የኢስራኤል ደጋፊ ቡድኖች ውሳኔውን ቢቃወሙም፣ ደጋፊዎች ግን በክልሉ ውስጥ እውነትን እና ፍትህን ለማስፈን ይህ እርምጃ አስፈላጊ መሆኑን ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: Sinoodosii Waldaa Kiristaanaa Ingiliiz yaada Kiristaanota Falasxiin dhaggeeffachuufi imaammata invastimantii isaanii seera idil-addunyaa waliin walsimsiisuuf murteesseera. Murteen kun walitti buiinsa Israa'elifi Falasxiin ilaalchisee Waldaan kun jijjiirama guddaa akka agarsiisuufi itti gaafatamummaa seenaa isaa bahachuuf tarkaanfii fudhateedha. Gareewwan Israa'el deggeran tokko tokko murtee kana kan morman yoo ta'u, deggeroonni garuu naannicha keessatti dhugaafi haqni akka mirkanaa'uuf tarkaanfichi murteessaa akka ta'e dubbatu.

title: Why is the US attacking southern Iran’s civilian infrastructure?
english: The United States has intensified its military campaign against Iran, targeting critical civilian infrastructure such as bridges, water facilities, and railways. While the U.S. aims to limit Iranian influence in the Strait of Hormuz and exert economic pressure, the strikes have damaged daily life and escalated regional tensions. These attacks occur despite a previous ceasefire agreement, leading to a wider cycle of retaliation involving neighboring countries.
amharic: አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ የምታደርገውን ወታደራዊ ዘመቻ በማጠናከር በድልድዮች፣ በውሃ ተቋማት እና በባቡር ጣቢያዎች ያሉ የሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶችን እያጠቃች ነው። አሜሪካ ይህንን የምታደርገው በሆርሙዝ ባህር ሰላጤ ላይ የኢራንን ተጽዕኖ ለመቀነስ እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ ጫና ለመፍጠር ቢሆንም፣ ጥቃቱ የሲቪሎችን የዕለት ተዕለት ኑሮ እየጎዳ ይገኛል። ቀደም ሲል የተደረሰው የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት ቢኖርም፣ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ በአካባቢው ያሉ ሌሎች ሀገራትም በተፅዕኖው ውስጥ ገብተዋል።
oromo: Ameerikaan duula waraanaa Iran irratti gaggeessitu jabeessuun, bu'uuraalee misoomaa kanneen akka daandiiwwan, iddoowwan bishaanii fi buufataalee baaburaa irratti haleellaa raawwachaa jirti. Ameerikaan gocha kana kan raawwattu dhiibbaa diinagdee uumuufi harka Iran kan galaana Hormuz irratti qabdu dadhabsiisuuf ta'us, haleellaan kun jireenya guyyaa guyyaa namoota nagaa miidheera. Walii galteen dhaabbii waraanaa duraan godhamee ture cabuun isaa, walitti bu'iinsi biyyoota lamaan gidduu jiru daran akka hammaatuu fi biyyoonni ollaas miidhaa kana keessatti akka hirmaatan taasiseera.

title: Japan passes legislation banning violation of national flag
english: Japan has passed a new law that criminalizes the public desecration of its national flag, with penalties including prison time or significant fines. While the government claims this creates consistency with protections already in place for foreign flags, it specifically exempts artistic media like anime and digital content. Critics argue that the law is vaguely worded and could be used by authorities to suppress free speech and punish political dissenters.
amharic: ጃፓን የሀገሪቱን ባንዲራ በይፋ ማዋረድን ወንጀል የሚያደርግ አዲስ ህግ አፅድቃለች፣ ይህም እስከ እስራት ወይም ከፍተኛ የገንዘብ መቀጮ የሚያስቀጣ ነው። መንግስት ይህ ህግ ለውጭ ሀገራት ባንዲራዎች ከሚሰጠው ጥበቃ ጋር ተመሳሳይነት እንዲኖረው የተደረገ መሆኑን ቢገልጽም፣ የጥበብ ስራዎችን እና ዲጂታል ይዘቶችን ከህጉ ነጻ አድርጓል። ተቺዎች ግን ህጉ ግልጽ ባልሆነ አገላለጽ የተጻፈ በመሆኑ፣ የመናገር ነጻነትን ለመገደብ እና መንግስትን የሚቃወሙ ሰዎችን ለማፈን ሊውል እንደሚችል ስጋታቸውን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Jaappaan alaabaa biyyattii irratti gochaa tuffii raawwachuu yakka taasisuun seera haaraa raggaasifteetti; seerichi hidhaa ykn adabbii maallaqaa cimaa kan hordofsiisu dha. Mootummaan tarkaanfiin kun alaabaa biyyoota alaa irraa akka eegamu seera jiru wajjin wal simsiisuuf kan fuule jedheera; haa ta'u malee, hojiiwwan aartii fi qabiyyee dijitaalaa seera kana keessaa bilisa ta'aniiru. Gareewwan mormituu garuu, seerichi jechoota ifa hin taaneen kan barreeffameefii mirga yaada ibsachuu miidhuu fi namoota mormitoota ta'an adabuuf itti fayyadamaamuu danda'a jedhanii sodaatu.

title: Trump’s new election push, explained
english: President Donald Trump recently utilized a primetime address from the White House to revisit his disputed claims regarding the 2020 election results. During the broadcast, he advocated for specific electoral modifications as the nation prepares for the upcoming 2026 midterm cycle. Analysts are currently examining his statements in the context of available evidence and the strategic timing of his political messaging.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በቅርቡ ከኋይት ሀውስ ባደረጉት ንግግር ስለ 2020 ምርጫ ውጤት ያላቸውን አወዛጋቢ አቋም እንደገና አንስተዋል። በንግግራቸውም አገሪቱ ወደ 2026 የመሃል ምርጫ ስትዘጋጅ አስፈላጊ ናቸው ያሏቸውን የምርጫ ለውጦች ጠይቀዋል። ባለሙያዎች የትራምፕን ንግግር ካለው ማስረጃ እና የጊዜ አጠቃቀም አንጻር እየገመገሙት ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Pireezidaant Donald Traamp dhiheenya kana mana mootummaa (White House) irraa haasaa taasisaniin, bu'aa filannoo bara 2020 irratti yaada isaanii duraanii irra deebiin kaasuun mormii isaanii ibsataniiru. Haasaa isaanii kanaanis, biyyittiin gara filannoo giddu-galeessa bara 2026 qophaa'aa jirtu kana keessatti jijjiiramoota filannoo ta'an barbaachisaa ta'an kaasaniiru. Qorattoonni haasaa Traamp kana ragaa jiruufi yeroo haasaan kun itti ta'e giddugaleessa godhachuun gamaaggamaa jiru.

title: India debuts hydrogen-powered train as part of sustainability drive
english: India has officially introduced its first domestically produced hydrogen-powered train, known as the NaMo Green Rail, to promote sustainable transportation. Operating between Jind and Sonipat, this zero-emission locomotive serves as a clean alternative to diesel in areas where standard electrical power is unavailable. This initiative is a key part of India's broader strategy to achieve net-zero carbon emissions across its massive railway network by 2030.
amharic: ህንድ ለአካባቢ ጥበቃ ተስማሚ የሆነ የትራንስፖርት አገልግሎትን ለማስፋፋት በሀገር ውስጥ የተመረተ የመጀመሪያውን በሃይድሮጅን የሚሰራ ባቡር በይፋ አስጀመረች። 'ናሞ ግሪን ሬይል' የሚል ስያሜ የተሰጠው ይህ ባቡር በጂንድ እና ሶኒፓት ከተሞች መካከል የሚመላለስ ሲሆን፣ የናፍጣ ነዳጅን በመተካት ከካርቦን ልቀት ነፃ የሆነ የጉዞ አማራጭን ይፈጥራል። ይህ ፕሮጀክት ህንድ የባቡር መረቧን በ2030 ዓ.ም የካርቦን ልቀት ወደሌለበት ደረጃ ለማድረስ የያዘችው ትልቅ እቅድ አካል ነው።
oromo: Indiyaan tajaajila geejjiba irra caalaatti qulqulluu ta'e babal'isuuf, baabura bifa haayidroojiinii (hydrogen) fayyadamuun hojjettu kan biyya keessatti oomishame jalqabaa hojiirra oolchiteetti. 'NaMo Green Rail' kan jedhamu kun magaalaawwan Jind fi Sonipat gidduutti kan deddeebi'u yoo ta'u, suuta suutaan baabura boba'aa naayitroojiinii (diesel) fayyadaman bakka buusuun qilleensa faalamuu irraa bilisa ta'e uuma. Tajaajilli kun karoorri Indiyaa guddichi kan bara 2030 keessatti tajaajila baaburaa biyyattii guutuu keessatti guutummaatti faalama qilleensaa xiqqeessuuf qabatte keessaa tokko dha.

title: Fears grow for Sahrawi prisoner entering sixth week of hunger strike in Morocco
english: Sahrawi activist Naama Asfari is in critical condition after entering the sixth week of a hunger strike in a Moroccan prison. He is demanding his release in accordance with UN rulings that found his conviction was based on evidence obtained through torture. Human rights organizations are now urging Moroccan authorities to release him and protect his health following his long protest.
amharic: የሳህራዊ አክቲቪስት ናማ አስፋሪ በሞሮኮ እስር ቤት የጀመሩት የረሃብ አድማ ስድስተኛ ሳምንቱን ይዟል፣ ይህም ለጤንነታቸው ከፍተኛ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። እስረኛው የተፈረደባቸው በማሰቃየት በተገኙ ማስረጃዎች ላይ በመሆኑ፣ የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት ውሳኔዎችን መሰረት በማድረግ እንዲፈቱ እየጠየቁ ይገኛሉ። የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋች ድርጅቶችም የሞሮኮ ባለስልጣናት እስረኛውን በአስቸኳይ እንዲለቁና የጤና ሁኔታቸው እንዳይባባስ ጥሪ እያቀረቡ ነው።
oromo: Duula beelaa mana hidhaa Morookoo keessatti jalqaban torban ja’affaa irra kan ga’an, aktivistiin Sahraawii Naama Asfaarii haala yaaddisaa keessa jiru. Inni hidhaan isaa ragaalee dararaa qaamaan argaman irratti kan hundaa’e ta’uu UN ibsuun, akka inni gadi lakkifamu gaafachaa jira. Gareewwan mirga namoomaaf falmanis mootummaan Morookoo akka isa gadi lakkisuufi fayyaa isaa eeguuf tarkaanfii ariifachiisaa akka fudhatan waamicha dhiheessaa jiru.

title: Malaysia vows to deport Israelis found in digital nomads community
english: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim has announced that any Israeli citizens found in the country will be immediately deported because Malaysia does not recognize Israel. Authorities are currently investigating a digital nomad community in Johor following reports that some participants may be Israelis using dual-nationality passports to enter. Officials intend to verify the identities of these individuals and take strict action if immigration laws were violated.
amharic: የማሌዢያው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዋር ኢብራሂም ማሌዢያ እስራኤልን ስለማትቀበል በሀገሪቱ የሚገኙ ማናቸውንም የእስራኤል ዜጎች ወዲያውኑ እንደሚያባርሩ አስታውቀዋል። ባለስልጣናት በጆሆር ግዛት የሚገኝ የዲጂታል ዘላኖች ማህበረሰብ፣ የእስራኤል ዜጎች በሁለተኛ ፓስፖርት ተጠቅመው ሀገሪቱን እንደገቡ በመጠረጠሩ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ነው። መንግስት የተሳታፊዎችን ማንነት በማጣራት የኢሚግሬሽን ህግ ጥሰት ከተገኘ ተገቢውን እርምጃ ለመውሰድ ዝግጁ መሆኑን ገልጿል።
oromo: Mummichi ministeeraa Maleeziyaa Anwaar Ibraahim, biyyattiin Israa'el waan hin beekneef lammiileen Israa'el biyyattii keessatti argaman kamiyyuu akka ari'aman beeksisaniiru. Abbootiin taayitaa hawaasa 'digital nomads' kan Johor keessatti argamu, namoonni Israa'el ta'an paaspoortii lammaffaa fayyadamuun biyyattii seenuu isaanii erga shakkamee booda qorannoo jalqabaniiru. Mootummaan eenyummaa hirmaattotaa mirkaneessuun, seera godaantotaa cabsuun kan argaman irratti tarkaanfiin cimaan akka fudhatamu ibseera.

title: Only three commodity vessels crossed Strait of Hormuz on Thursday
english: On Thursday, the Strait of Hormuz saw only three commodity ships, marking the lowest traffic level since May. This significant decline was caused by the United States reinstating a blockade, forcing many vessels to change course or pause their journeys. As a result of this disruption in transit, international energy costs have climbed.
amharic: ባለፈው ሐሙስ በሆርሙዝ ባህር ሰላጤ ማለፍ የቻሉት ሶስት የሸቀጥ መርከቦች ብቻ ሲሆኑ ይህም ከግንቦት ወር ወዲህ ዝቅተኛው ቁጥር ነው። አሜሪካ በባህር ሰላጤው ላይ ባደረገችው ተደጋጋሚ እገዳ ሳቢያ በርካታ መርከቦች መንገዳቸውን እንዲቀይሩ ወይም ጉዟቸውን እንዲያቆሙ ተገደዋል። ይህ የትራፊክ መስተጓጎል በአለም አቀፍ የኢነርጂ ዋጋ ላይ ጭማሪ አስከትሏል።
oromo: Guyyaa Kamisaa dabre, markaboonni meeshaalee fe'an sadii qofatu Handhuura Hormuz ce'e; kunis baay'ina gadi bu'aa gaafa baatiin Caamsaa as argameedha. Akkaataa itti fayyadamaa fi sochiin markabootaa kun kan hir'ate sababa Ameerikaan gufuu iddoo kana irratti deebitee kaa'iteefidha. Rakkoon qaxxaamuraa kunis gatiin anniisaa addunyaa irratti akka ol ka'u taasiseera.

title: Israeli forces kill three people in strikes on Gaza
english: Israeli military strikes resulted in the deaths of three individuals across different locations in Gaza. Attacks were reported at a makeshift shelter for displaced people in Nuseirat, a residential home in Gaza City, and an area situated near a school in Beit Lahia. These incidents also left several other people wounded throughout the region.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶች በጋዛ በተለያዩ አካባቢዎች በሶስት ሰዎች ላይ ሞት አስከትለዋል። ጥቃቶቹ በኑሰይራት ተፈናቃዮች በሚገኙበት መጠለያ፣ በጋዛ ከተማ በሚገኝ የመኖሪያ ቤት እና በቤት ላሂያ ትምህርት ቤት አቅራቢያ ተፈጽመዋል። በእነዚህ ጥቃቶች ምክንያት ሌሎች በርካታ ሰዎችም ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል።
oromo: Humni waraana Israa'el iddoowwan adda addaa Gaazaatti raawwateen namoonni sadii du'aniiru. Haleellaan kunneenis qubannaa namoota buqqa'anii Nuseiraat jiran, mana jireenyaa magaalaa Gaazaafi mana barumsaa Beet Laahiyaa biratti raawwatameera. Haleellaa kanaan namoonni biroon hedduun immoo madaa'aniiru.

title: Israeli Trump ally backs Argentina over Falklands after England’s World Cup defeat
english: Following Argentina's World Cup victory over England, an Israeli-American political figure named Marc Zell has urged the Trump administration to re-examine US support for British sovereignty over the Falkland Islands. Zell suggested that reconsidering this stance could serve as a penalty against Britain for failing to support the US and Israel in their conflict with Iran. Argentine President Javier Milei, who is known for his strong pro-Israel alignment, expressed his support for this diplomatic shift while British officials maintained that the islands firmly remain under UK control.
amharic: አርጀንቲና በእንግሊዝ ላይ ባገኘችው የዓለም ዋንጫ ድል ተከትሎ፣ ማርክ ዘል የተባሉ እስራኤላዊ አሜሪካዊ ፖለቲከኛ፣ አሜሪካ በፎክላንድ ደሴቶች ላይ ያላትን የብሪታኒያ የሉዓላዊነት ድጋፍ እንደገና እንድትመረምር ለፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል። ይህ እርምጃ ብሪታኒያ ከአሜሪካ እና እስራኤል ጋር በመሆን በኢራን ላይ የጦርነት ድጋፍ ባለመስጠቷ ምክንያት እንደ ቅጣት ሊወሰድ እንደሚችል ዘል ጠቁመዋል። ጠንካራ የእስራኤል ደጋፊ የሆኑት የአርጀንቲናው ፕሬዝዳንት ጃቪየር ሚሌይ በዚህ ሃሳብ መደሰታቸውን ሲገልጹ፣ የብሪታኒያ መንግስት በበኩሉ ደሴቶቹ በብሪታኒያ ቁጥጥር ስር እንደሚቆዩ አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Injifannoo Arjentiinaan tapha waancaa addunyaa irratti Ingilizii irratti argatte booda, siyaasaa Israa'el-Ameerikaa Maark Zeel jedhaman, bulchiinsi Trump deeggarsa Ameerikaan birmadummaa Britaan irratti qabdu kan gosaafi (Falkland Islands) akka irra deebiin ilaaltu gaafataniiru. Zeel, Britaan Ameerikaafi Israa'el waraana Iraan irratti taasisaa jiran keessatti tumsuu diduu isheetiin akka adabbii tokkootti kanneen akka irratti deebi'uu danda'u ibsaniiru. Preezidaantiin Arjentiinaa Javier Milei kan Israa'el cimsanii deggeran, yaadni kun akka isaan gammachiise yoo ibsan, mootummaan Britaan immoo qe'een kun kan isaanii ta'uu isaa jabeessee ibseera.

title: Knesset dissolves: How will Israel vote in October’s general election?
english: The Israeli parliament has dissolved, setting the stage for a general election on October 27, 2026, following its first completed term in decades. This government has faced significant international backlash for its military actions in Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran, as well as controversial settlement expansions. As voters head to the polls, the country's proportional representation system will require parties to form complex coalitions, amidst signs that the electorate is continuing to shift toward right-wing politics.
amharic: የእስራኤል ፓርላማ በአስርተ ዓመታት ውስጥ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ሙሉ የስልጣን ዘመኑን ካጠናቀቀ በኋላ መፍረሱ ተነግሯል። መንግሥቱ በጋዛ፣ በሊባኖስ እና በኢራን ባካሄደው ጦርነት እንዲሁም በተከራካሪ የሰፈራ ማስፋፊያ ፕሮግራሞቹ ከፍተኛ ዓለም አቀፍ ትችት ሲቀርብበት ቆይቷል። በአሁኑ ወቅት ሀገሪቱ በጥቅምት ወር በሚካሄደው አጠቃላይ ምርጫ በምርጫ ሥርዓቷ መሰረት የቅንጅት መንግሥት ለመመስረት እየተዘጋጀች ሲሆን፣ መራጮችም ወደ ቀኝ አክራሪነት እያዘነበሉ እንደሚገኙ ይገመታል።
oromo: Mana maree Israa'el waggoota hedduu booda yeroo jalqabaaf aangoo isaa guutuu erga xumuree booda bittineeffameera. Mootummaan kun waraana Gaaza, Libaanoos fi Iraan keessatti gaggeesse akkasumas babal'ina buufataalee mormii kaaseef guutummaa addunyaa biratti qeeqameera. Yeroo ammaatti biyyattiin filannoo Onkololeessa dhufu gaggeeffamuuf qophaa'aa jirtu yoo ta'u, sirna filannoo biyyattii hordofuun mootummaa waliin tumsaa hundeessuuf yaaliin godhamaa jira, akkasumas uummanni gara siyaasa mirgaatti dabalaa akka jiru eerameera.

title: Has Ukraine’s Zelenskyy created a rival by sacking his defence minister?
english: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has dismissed Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov after just seven months, triggering public protests across the country. Fedorov was known for his ambitious reform efforts and his criticism of military inefficiency, which often brought him into conflict with top-level commanders. His sudden removal has generated significant public backlash, with some supporters suggesting that Fedorov could emerge as a viable political challenger to Zelenskyy.
amharic: የዩክሬኑ ፕሬዝዳንት ቮሎዲሚር ዘለንስኪ የመከላከያ ሚኒስትሩን ሚካሂሎ ፌዶሮቭን ከስራ አባረዋቸዋል። ይህ ውሳኔ በመላው ሀገሪቱ ተቃውሞዎችን አስነስቷል። ፌዶሮቭ በወታደራዊው ዘርፍ ላይ ላደረጉት የሪፎርም ጥረት እና ለአመራር ክፍተቶች የነበራቸው ትችት ይታወቅ የነበረ ሲሆን ይህም ከከፍተኛ ወታደራዊ መኮንኖች ጋር ግጭት ውስጥ እንዲገቡ አድርጓቸዋል። የእሳቸው መባረር ህዝቡን በማስቆጣቱ፣ ደጋፊዎቻቸው ለዘለንስኪ የፖለቲካ ተቀናቃኝ ሊሆኑ እንደሚችሉ እየተነገረ ነው።
oromo: Pireezidaantiin Yukireen Volodimiir Zelenski ministira ittisa biyyaa Mikayilo Fedoroviin hojiirraa ari'aniiru. Murteen kun guutuu biyyattii keessatti mormii kaaseera. Fedorov hojii jijjiiramaa fi rakkoolee bulchiinsa waraanaa irratti qeeqaa waan tureef, ajootota waraanaa olaanoo wajjin wal dhabdee keessa ture. Aari'amuun isaa kun ummata biratti mufannaa guddaa uumeera; gariin deggartootaa immoo Fedorov fuulduratti Zelenskiif dorgomaa siyaasaa ta'uu danda'a jedhanii amanu.

title: As Chinese economy slows, experts say there will be ‘problems for Beijing’
english: China's economic growth has slowed to 4.3 percent as a result of weak domestic consumption and a struggling real estate sector. Although the country is seeing a major surge in exports, this imbalance is creating international trade tensions and financial pressure on Chinese households. Experts warn that Beijing faces significant challenges unless it can move away from its heavy reliance on exports and encourage local spending.
amharic: የቻይና ኢኮኖሚ ዕድገት በቤት ውስጥ ፍጆታ መዳከም እና በሪል እስቴት ዘርፍ ውድቀት ምክንያት ወደ 4.3 በመቶ ዝቅ ብሏል። ምንም እንኳን ሀገሪቱ በኤክስፖርት ዘርፍ ከፍተኛ መነቃቃት እያሳየች ቢሆንም፣ ይህ አለመመጣጠን በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የንግድ ውጥረት እና በቻይና ቤተሰቦች ላይ የኢኮኖሚ ጫና ፈጥሯል። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚያስጠነቅቁት ቤጂንግ በኤክስፖርት ላይ ብቻ ከመደገፍ ወጥታ የውስጥ ፍጆታን ማበረታታት ካልቻለች ከባድ ፈተናዎች ይጠብቋታል።
oromo: Guddinni dinagdee Chaayinaa hir'ina fayyadama keessoo fi rakkoo damee mana ijaarsaa irraa kan ka'e gara dhibbeentaa 4.3 tti gadi bu'eera. Biyyati kun ergaa alaa irratti guddina guddaa agarsiisaa jirtus, madaallii dhabuun kun walitti bu'iinsa daldala idil-addunyaa fi dhiibbaa dinagdee maatiiwwan Chaayinaa irra ga'aa jiru uumeera. Ogeeyyiin akka akeekkachiisanitti, Beijing ergaa alaa irratti qofa hirkachuu dhiistee fayyadama keessoo ishee jajjabeessuu baannaan, rakkoowwan gurguddaan ishee eeggatu.

title: FIFA World Cup: 10 things to know before Spain-Argentina final in New York
english: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concludes this Sunday in New York with a highly anticipated final match between Spain and Argentina. This historic game features a generational clash between Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal, linked by a viral 2007 photo taken when Yamal was an infant. US President Donald Trump is scheduled to attend the event and will assist in presenting the trophy to the winning captain.
amharic: የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በዚህ እሁድ በኒውዮርክ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል ይካሄዳል። ይህ ታሪካዊ ጨዋታ ሊዮኔል ሜሲን እና ላሚን ያማልን የሚያገናኝ ሲሆን፣ ሁለቱ ተጫዋቾች በያማል የሕጻንነት ጊዜ በ2007 በተነሱት ዝነኛ ፎቶ ይታወቃሉ። የአሜሪካው ፕሬዚዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በጨዋታው ላይ በመገኘት ዋንጫውን ለሚያሸንፈው ቡድን ካፒቴን ከፊፋ ፕሬዚዳንት ጋር ያበረክታሉ።
oromo: Waliigalteen tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 Dilbata dhufu New Yorkitti, biyyoota Ispeenifi Arjantiinaa gidduutti kan gaggeeffamu ta'a. Taphi seena-qabeessi kun, taphatoota gosa adda addaa kan ta'an Lionel Messiifi Lamine Yamal kan walitti fidu yoo ta'u, isaanis suuraa bara 2007 Yamal daa'ima ta'ee ka'ame tokkoon kan wal-beekaniidha. Preezidaantichi Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraamp taphicharratti kan argaman ta'uun, waancichas pireezidaantii FIFA wajjin ta'uun kabajamoota mo'attootaaf kan kennan ta'a.

title: Israel headed for October election as parliament dissolved
english: Israel's parliament has officially dissolved, setting the stage for a critical national election on October 27. This vote serves as a major test for Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, whose political future is threatened by ongoing military conflicts and public dissatisfaction. Before the session ended, the government passed several controversial laws to support their campaign and satisfy nationalist allies, though current polls suggest they face a difficult path to retaining power.
amharic: የእስራኤል ፓርላማ በይፋ መፍረሱን ተከትሎ ለጥቅምት 17 ቀን ሀገራዊ ምርጫ መዘጋጀቱ ታውቋል። ይህ ምርጫ በጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንያሚን ኔታንያሁ የፖለቲካ ሕይወት ላይ ትልቅ ፈተና ሆኖ ቀርቧል፤ ምክንያቱም በጦርነቶች ሳቢያ የሕዝብ ቁጣ እየጨመረ ነው። ምርጫው ከመካሄዱ በፊት መንግሥት ለዘመቻው የሚረዱ አወዛጋቢ ሕጎችን ያፀደቀ ሲሆን፣ በአሁኑ ወቅት የሕዝብ አስተያየቶች እንደሚጠቁሙት ኔታንያሁ ሥልጣናቸውን ለማቆየት ከባድ ፉክክር ይጠብቃቸዋል።
oromo: Mana maree biyyattii Israa'el diigamee, filannoon biyyoolessaa guyyaa Onkoloolessa 27 akka gaggeeffamu ifa ta'eera. Filannoon kun dhimma gara fuulduraa muummicha ministeeraa Benyaamin Neetaanyaahuu irratti murteessaa kan ta'e yoo ta'u, waldhabdee waraanaa fi mufannaa ummataa irraa kan ka'e rakkoo cimaa keessa jiru. Manni maree yeroo hojii isaa xumuruun dura, mootummaan tarsiimoo filannoo isaa irratti kan gargaaran seerota mormisiisoo dabarsuun isaa kan beekamu yoo ta'u, qorannoon ammaa akka agarsiisutti mootummaan amma jiru aangootti deebi'uuf qormaata cimaa keessa jira.

title: Gulf states come under Iranian fire as US strikes intensify
english: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated as Iran launched drone and missile attacks against several Gulf nations and regional neighbors in retaliation for ongoing US airstrikes. Iran claims these strikes target US military bases and infrastructure used to launch attacks against its own territory. The US military campaign has focused on Iranian civilian and transport infrastructure, leading to casualties and widespread regional instability.
amharic: አሜሪካ በአንጻሩ በኢራን ላይ የምታደርገውን የአየር ድብደባ አጠናክራ በመቀጠሏ፣ ኢራንም በምላሹ በተለያዩ የባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት እና ጎረቤት አገራት ላይ የሚሳይል እና የድሮን ጥቃት አድርሳለች። ኢራን እነዚህን ጥቃቶች የፈጸመችው አሜሪካ በነዚህ አገራት በሚገኙ ወታደራዊ መሠረቶቿ በመጠቀም በእሷ ላይ ጥቃት እየሰነዘረች ነው በሚል ሰበብ ነው። የአሜሪካ የአየር ዘመቻ በኢራን የመሠረተ ልማት እና የሲቪል ተቋማት ላይ ያነጣጠረ ሲሆን፣ ይህም በክልሉ ውስጥ ከፍተኛ ውጥረት እና የሰው ህይወት መጥፋትን አስከትሏል።
oromo: USAn tarkaanfii qilleensa irraa Iranirratti fudhachaa jirtu cimsuu hordofee, Iran biyyoota Gulfii fi ollaa ishee irratti haleellaa xiyyaara maleeyyii fi misaa'elaan gaggeessiteetti. Iran haleellaa kana kan raawwatte, USA buufata waraanaa biyyoota kana keessa jiran fayyadamuun irratti duulaa jirti jechuun komachuun dha. Duulli waraana USA kun bu'uuraalee misoomaa fi gamoolee biyyaattii irratti kan xiyyeeffate yoo ta'u, kunis naannichatti muddama guddaa fi lubbuu namootaa galaafachaa jira.

title: US attacks southern Iran, as Tehran hits Gulf countries: What’s the latest?
english: For the sixth consecutive night, the United States conducted military strikes across southern Iran, targeting infrastructure including bridges and power lines, which resulted in several casualties. In retaliation, Iran launched drones and missiles at various nations in the Gulf region, including Qatar and Bahrain, and targeted American military bases. These developments mark a significant escalation in hostilities despite previous attempts at diplomatic negotiations to end the conflict.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለስድስት ተከታታይ ምሽቶች በደቡብ ኢራን ላይ ያደረሰችውን የአየር ጥቃት ቀጥላለች፤ ጥቃቱ ድልድዮችንና የኤሌክትሪክ መስመሮችን በመምታቱ የሰው ህይወት አልፏል። ኢራንም ለዚህ ምላሽ በባህሬን፣ በኳታር እና በሌሎች የባህረ ሰላጤው ሀገራት እንዲሁም በአሜሪካ የጦር ሰፈሮች ላይ ሚሳይልና ድሮን በመተኮስ አጸፋዊ እርምጃ ወስዳለች። ይህ ግጭት ቀደም ሲል የነበረውን የዲፕሎማሲያዊ የሰላም ጥረት በማክሸፍ በሁለቱ ወገኖች መካከል ያለውን ውጥረት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Ameerikaan halkan ja'affaadhaaf walitti aansuudhaan kibba Iraan irratti miidhaa qaqqabsiisaa jirti; weerarri kunis daandiiwwan guguddaa fi sarara ibsaa irratti xiyyeeffachuun lubbuu namoota hedduu galaafateera. Iraanis deebii weerara kanaatiin biyyoota Gulfii fi buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa kanneen naannichatti argaman irratti xiyyara malee fi misayilii dhukaasteetti. Gochi kun marii nagaa dura taasifamaa ture balleessee, waldhabdee gidduu lameenii sadarkaa ol'aanaatti gurguddisuun isaa ibsameera.

title: Why is Pakistan’s Sindh province facing a major child HIV outbreak?
english: A serious HIV outbreak has emerged at two government-run hospitals in Karachi, Pakistan, resulting in over 130 infections, primarily among children. Investigations have revealed that the crisis was caused by systemic failures, such as the improper reuse of syringes and a lack of adherence to basic medical safety protocols. Authorities have identified specific staff members responsible for these administrative lapses that led to the dangerous spread of the virus.
amharic: በፓኪስታን ካራቺ በሚገኙ ሁለት የመንግስት ሆስፒታሎች ውስጥ የተከሰተው ከፍተኛ የኤችአይቪ ወረርሽኝ ከ130 በላይ የሚሆኑ ህጻናትን ጨምሮ ሌሎች ሰዎችን ለበሽታው ዳርጓል። የተደረጉ ምርመራዎች እንደሚያሳዩት ወረርሽኙ የተከሰተው መርፌን በአግባቡ ባለመጠቀም እና መሰረታዊ የህክምና ደህንነት መመሪያዎችን ባለመከተል ነው። መንግስት ለዚህ የጤና ቀውስ መባባስ ተጠያቂ የሆኑትን ሰራተኞች ለይቶ እርምጃ እየወሰደ ይገኛል።
oromo: Godina Sindh kan Pakistan, magaalota Karachi keessatti hospitaalota mootummaa lama keessatti dhibeen HIV babal'achuun ijoollee dabalatee namoota 130 ol qabsiiseera. Qorannoon akka mirkaneessetti, rakkoon kun kan dhufe fayyadamni sirrii hin taane kan sirinjii fi seeronni eegumsa fayyaa hospitaalichaa keessatti cabuu isaaniitiin dha. Aangeyyoonni qorannoo gaggeessaniin hojjettoota yakka kanaan himataman adda baasanii tarkaanfii fudhachaa jiru.

title: John Esposito transformed how the West understood Islam
english: John Esposito, a renowned Georgetown University scholar, passed away on July 15 after a distinguished career dedicated to bridge-building between Islam and the West. Throughout his life, he authored over 55 books that challenged traditional Western biases and provided nuanced insights into Muslim societies during periods of global tension. His work remains a vital contribution to religious studies, helping the world better understand the intersection of faith and international politics.
amharic: ታዋቂው የጆርጅታውን ዩኒቨርሲቲ ምሁር ጆን ኤስፖዚቶ በእስልምና እና በምዕራቡ ዓለም መካከል ያለውን ግንኙነት በማሻሻል ያሳለፉትን የላቀ የሙያ ዘመን ካጠናቀቁ በኋላ ሐምሌ 15 ቀን ከዚህ ዓለም በሞት ተለይተዋል። በሕይወት ዘመናቸው ከ55 በላይ መጽሐፍትን የጻፉ ሲሆን፣ እነዚህ ሥራዎች በምዕራቡ ዓለም የነበሩ የተሳሳቱ አመለካከቶችን በመሞገት እስልምናን በአግባቡ እንዲታይ አስችለዋል። የእርሳቸው አስተዋጽኦ በሃይማኖታዊ ጥናቶች ዘርፍ ትልቅ ቦታ የሚሰጠው ሲሆን፣ በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የእምነት እና የፖለቲካ ትስስርን በግልጽ ለመረዳት ትልቅ ሚና ተጫውቷል።
oromo: Hayyuun beekkamaa Yunivarsitii Joorjiitaawun, Joohn Espoosiitoo, Islaamummaa fi dhiha gidduutti hariiroo gaarii uumuuf gumaacha guddaa erga godhanii booda, Adoolessa 15 du'aan addunyaa kanarraa boqotaniiru. Bara jireenya isaanii keessatti kitaabota 55 ol kan barreessan yoo ta'u, hojileen kunis yaada dogoggoraa dhihaatti ture mormuudhaan hawaasa Muslimaa sirriitti akka hubatamu gargaareera. Hojiiwwan isaa barnoota amantii keessatti gumaacha guddaa qabaachuu isaanii irra darbee, walitti dhufeenya amantii fi siyaasaa addunyaa irraatti hubannoo bal'aa uumaniiru.

title: Israeli parliament passes law enshrining gender segregation in universities
english: The Israeli parliament has passed a law permitting gender-segregated study tracks in universities for master's and doctoral programs. Proponents claim the move helps religious students access higher education, while opponents argue it promotes discrimination and inequality. The legislation has sparked significant controversy, with critics calling it a step toward the exclusion of women in public life.
amharic: የእስራኤል ፓርላማ በዩኒቨርሲቲዎች ውስጥ በወንዶች እና በሴቶች መካከል የትምህርት ክፍፍል እንዲኖር የሚያስችል አዲስ ህግ አፅድቋል። ደጋፊዎቹ ይህ ውሳኔ ሃይማኖተኛ ተማሪዎች ለከፍተኛ ትምህርት ያላቸውን እድል እንደሚያሰፋ ቢገልፁም፣ ተቃዋሚዎች ግን ህጉ መድልዎን እንደሚያበረታታ በመግለጽ በጥብቅ ይቃወማሉ። ተቺዎች ይህ አካሄድ በህዝባዊ ህይወት ውስጥ ሴቶችን ማግለል እንደሆነ በመግለጽ ስጋታቸውን እየገለጹ ይገኛል።
oromo: Mana maree Israa'el yuunivarsitiiwwan keessatti barattoota dhiiraa fi dubartoota gargar baasuun barsiisuu kan hayyamu seera haarawa tokko raggaasiseera. Gariin namootaa tarkaanfiin kun barattoota amantii hordofanif carraa barnootaa kan bal'isu ta'uu dubbatanis, mormitoonni garuu seerni kun jibbaa fi wal-qixxummaa dhabamsiisuu kan jajjabeessu ta'uu ibsuun balaaleffataniiru. Murtii kana kan morman qaamonni, tarkaanfiin kun hawaasa keessatti dubartoota gargar baasuu fi haqamuu kan geessisu ta'uu akeekkachiisaniiru.

title: Why Europe should stop lecturing China on human rights
english: The European Union is increasingly criticizing China's recent legislation regarding ethnic unity, accusing it of promoting forced assimilation. However, Beijing rejects these claims as hypocritical, arguing that the law actually supports minority development and respects language diversity. Critics suggest the EU's confrontational approach risks damaging diplomatic ties while ignoring similar language policies practiced by Western nations.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት በቅርቡ በቻይና የወጣውን የብሔር አንድነት ህግ በመተቸት ህጉን የግዳጅ assimilation (የባህል ውህደት) የሚያራምድ ነው ሲል ይከሳል። ቤጂንግ በበኩሏ ይህ ክስ አድልዎ የተሞላበት እና ግብዝነት ያለበት መሆኑን በመግለጽ፣ ህጉ የብሔረሰቦችን ልማት እና የቋንቋ መብቶችን የሚያከብር መሆኑን ትከራከራለች። አንዳንዶች የአውሮፓ ህብረት ይህንን አቋም መያዙ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነቱን ሊጎዳው እንደሚችል እና በምዕራባውያን ሀገራት ተመሳሳይ ህጎች ላይ ዝምታ መምረጡ አድልዎ እንዳለበት ያሳያል ሲሉ ይተቻሉ።
oromo: Gamtaan Awurooppaa seerri tokkummaa sanyii kan Chaayinaan baaste dhiibbaa fi dirqamaan namoota sanyii adda addaa tokko gochuuf kan yaade dha jechuun komata. Chaayinaan gama ishiitiin, komiin kun of-qulqulleessuu fi fakkaattummaa kan qabuudha jettee, seerichi guddina fi mirga afaan sanyiiwwan xixiqqoo kan kabajuu fi kan deeggaru ta'uu ibsite. Namoonni tokko tokko immoo, Gamtaan Awurooppaa gocha kana irratti fuulleffachuun isaa hariiroo diippilomaasii miidhuu danda'a, akkasumas biyyoota dhihaa keessatti seerri wal fakkaatu yeroo jiraatu, Chaayinaa irratti qofa duuluun isaa of-qulqulleessuu akka ta'e dubbatu.

title: Vessel hit 19 nautical miles away from Oman, maritime body says
english: A tanker sailing near the coast of Oman was struck by an unidentified object on Thursday. Maritime authorities confirmed that all crew members remain unharmed following the incident. Fortunately, there has been no damage to the environment reported so far.
amharic: ሐሙስ ዕለት በኦማን የባህር ጠረፍ አቅራቢያ ይጓዝ የነበረ የነዳጅ መጫኛ መርከብ በማይታወቅ ነገር ተመቷል። የባህር ላይ ደህንነት ተቋማት እንደገለጹት፣ በመርከቧ ላይ የነበሩት ሰራተኞች በሙሉ ደህና ናቸው። በአደጋውም እስካሁን ድረስ በአካባቢው ላይ ምንም አይነት ጉዳት አልደረሰም።
oromo: Guyyaa Kamisaa doonii boba'aa Omaan biratti imalaa turte tokko wanta hin beekamneen rukutamteetti. Abbootiin taayitaa galaanaa akka ibsanitti, hojjettoonni doonittiin hundi nageenyi isaanii eegameera. Hanqina ykn miidhaan naannicharratti ga'es yeroof hin jiru.

title: US attack killed at least 38 since late June, Iran's health ministry says
english: According to Iran's health ministry, US military strikes since late June have resulted in at least 38 deaths. The casualties include one child and three women among those killed, while hundreds of other people have been injured. Officials noted that the total number of wounded individuals has exceeded 400 people.
amharic: የኢራን ጤና ጥበቃ ሚኒስቴር እንደገለጸው፣ ከሰኔ ወር መጨረሻ ጀምሮ በአሜሪካ በተፈጸሙ ጥቃቶች ቢያንስ 38 ሰዎች ሕይወታቸው አልፏል። ከተገደሉት መካከል አንድ ሕፃን እና ሦስት ሴቶች ይገኙበታል። በተጨማሪም ከ400 በላይ የሚሆኑ ሰዎች ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል።
oromo: Ministeerri Fayyaa Iraan akka ibsetti, erga dhuma ji'a Waxabajjii as weerara Ameerikaan gaggeessiteen namoonni 38 ol du'aniiru. Namoota du'an kana keessatti ijoolleen tokko fi dubartoonni sadii kan argaman yoo ta'u, namoonni 400 ol ta'an immoo miidhamaniiru.

title: US coalition shoots down drones over Iraq's Erbil: Kurdish counterterrorism forces
english: United States-led military forces successfully intercepted and destroyed eight drones carrying explosives near Erbil in Iraq's Kurdistan region early Friday morning. Authorities confirmed that the operation took place over a period of about an hour. Fortunately, there were no injuries or property damage resulting from the drone activity.
amharic: በአሜሪካ የሚመራው የቅንጅት ኃይላት አርብ ማለዳ በኢራቅ ኩርዲስታን ግዛት በምትገኘው ኤርቢል ከተማ ላይ ጥቃት ሊሰነዝሩ የነበሩ ስምንት ፈንጂ የጫኑ ድሮኖችን መትቶ መጣል ችሏል። የኩርድ የፀረ-ሽብርተኝነት ኃይላት እንደገለጹት ክስተቱ በአንድ ሰዓት ጊዜ ውስጥ የተፈጸመ ነው። በዚህ ድርጊት ምንም አይነት የሰው ህይወት መጥፋት ወይም የንብረት ውድመት አልተመዘገበም።
oromo: Humnoonni walta'iinsa Ameerikaan durfamu gubbaa magaalaa Erbil, naannoo Kurdistan kan Iraaq irratti xiyyara malee kanneen boombii fe'an saddeet ganama Jimaata darbe rukutanii kuffisaniiru. Humnoonni farra shororkeessummaa Kurdii akka ibsanitti, haalli kun sa'aatii tokko keessatti raawwatameera. Gidduu galeessa kanatti miidhaan lubbuus ta'e qabeenyaa gaheen akka hin jirre ibsameera.

title: Tigray’s Youth are Breaking the TPLF’s Narrative Monopoly
english: For decades, the TPLF maintained strict control over information in Tigray by suppressing independent media and using state outlets for propaganda. Recently, however, the rise of social media and independent digital activists has challenged this monopoly, weakening the party's influence. Young people are now using digital platforms to expose the party's failures and demand political change, effectively breaking the TPLF's long-standing grip on public discourse.
amharic: ለበርካታ አሥርተ ዓመታት ሕወሓት ነጻ ሚዲያዎችን በማፈን እና የራሱን የፕሮፓጋንዳ ማሰራጫዎች በመጠቀም በትግራይ የነበረውን የመረጃ ፍሰት ተቆጣጥሮ ነበር። በቅርብ ጊዜ ግን የማህበራዊ ሚዲያ እድገትና ገለልተኛ የዲጂታል አክቲቪስቶች መፈጠር የፓርቲውን የበላይነት እየገዳደረው ይገኛል። ወጣቶች አሁን የፓርቲውን ውድቀቶች ለማጋለጥና የፖለቲካ ለውጥ ለመጠየቅ እነዚህን መድረኮች በመጠቀማቸው ሕወሓት በሕዝብ አስተያየት ላይ የነበረው ጠንካራ ቁጥጥር እየተሸረሸረ ነው።
oromo: waggoota dheeraaf, TPLF miidiyaa bilisaa ukkaamsuun fi miidiyaalee mootummaa meeshaa propagandaa godhachuun odeeffannoo Tigraay keessatti to'achaa ture. Haata'u malee, yeroo ammaa babal'achuun miidiyaa hawaasaa fi qaamoleen iddoo adda addaatii sagalee isaanii dhageessisan aangoo to'annoo TPLF laaffisaa jira. Dargaggoonni ammaa miidiyaa hawaasaa fayyadamuun dogoggora paartichaa saaxilaa fi jijjiirama siyaasaa gaafachaa waan jiraniif, to'annoon TPLF irratti qabu hir'achaa dhufeera.

title: Trump alleges 'shocking vulnerabilities' in US election security ahead of midterms
english: Former President Donald Trump recently claimed that China interfered in the 2020 US election and highlighted alleged security weaknesses in voting systems. He stated that Chinese actors accessed millions of voter records, though he provided no evidence to support these assertions. US intelligence agencies and Chinese officials have both dismissed these claims, while Democrats criticized the speech as an attempt to undermine public confidence ahead of the midterm elections.
amharic: ቀድሞውኑ የአሜሪካ ፕሬዝዳንት የነበሩት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ፣ ቻይና በ2020 የአሜሪካ ምርጫ ጣልቃ እንደገባች እና በምርጫ ስርአቱ ላይ ከፍተኛ የደህንነት ክፍተቶች እንደነበሩ ተናግረዋል። ትራምፕ የቻይና አካላት በሚሊዮን የሚቆጠሩ መራጮች መረጃ ላይ መድረሳቸውን ቢገልጹም፣ ለዚህ የሚያቀርቡት ማስረጃ አልነበራቸውም። የአሜሪካ የስለላ ተቋማት እና የቻይና ባለስልጣናት እነዚህን ክሶች ውድቅ ያደረጉ ሲሆን፣ ዲሞክራቶች ደግሞ ንግግሩ በመጪው የህዝብ ተወካዮች ምርጫ ላይ እምነትን ለመሸርሸር የታለመ ነው በማለት ወቅሰዋል።
oromo: Pireezidaantii duraanii Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraamp, Chaayinaan filannoo Ameerikaa bara 2020 keessa harka keessa galchee fi sirna filannoo irratti hanqinni nageenyaa guddaan jiraachuu isaa himaniiru. Tiraamp qaamonni Chaayinaa ragaalee filattootaa miiliyoonaan lakkaawwaman harkatti galchuu isaanii dubbatanis, kanaaf ragaa qabatamaa hin dhiyeessine. Gamtaan ogeeyyota basaastota Ameerikaa fi bakka bu'oonni Chaayinaa himata kana kan morman yoo ta'u, paartiin Diimookraatotaa immoo haasaan kun filannoo giddu-galeessa waggaa dhufuun dura amantii uummataa bu'eessuuf kan qophaaye dha jechuun balaaleffataniiru.

title: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
english: Japan has passed legislation to reform its royal succession rules to address the shrinking size of the imperial family. The new law permits royal women to keep their titles after marrying commoners and allows the adoption of distant male relatives into the royal line. However, the legislation maintains the ban on female emperors, meaning Princess Aiko remains ineligible for the throne despite public preference for a change.
amharic: ጃፓን የንጉሣዊ ቤተሰቧ አባላት ቁጥር እየቀነሰ በመምጣቱ የዙፋን ውርስ ሕጓን አስተካክላለች። አዲሱ ሕግ የንጉሣዊ ቤተሰብ ሴቶች ተራ ዜጎችን ቢያገቡም ክብራቸውን እንዲጠብቁ እና የሩቅ ዘመድ የሆኑ ወንዶችን እንዲያሳድጉ ይፈቅዳል። ይሁን እንጂ ሴቶች በዙፋኑ ላይ እንዳይቀመጡ የሚከለክለው ሕግ አሁንም የጸና ሲሆን፣ በሕዝብ ዘንድ ተወዳጅነት ያላት ልዕልት አይኮ አሁንም ንግሥት መሆን አትችልም።
oromo: Japan maatii mootummaa ishee xiqqaachaa dhufuu ilaalchisee seera dhaala mootummaa ishee foyyeessiteetti. Seerri haaraan kun dubartoonni maatii mootummaa yoo namoota idilee fuudhan illee mirga isanii akka eeggatan akkasumas firoota dhiiraa fagootti argaman akka guddifatan heyyamuu qaba. Ta'us, seera dubartoonni akka mootitti hin muudamne dhowwu kun akka itti fufu waan ta'eef, loolli Aiko deggersa uummataa qabaatus gara fuulduraatti mootittii ta'uuf hin dandeessu.

title: Philippines condemns monkey video on Chinese media as racist
english: The Philippine government has strongly denounced a racist, AI-generated video published by China Daily that depicts the Philippines as a monkey manipulated by the U.S. and Japan. This video emerged amid ongoing tensions regarding territorial disputes in the South China Sea, where China frequently uses water cannons against Philippine ships. Manila officials have labeled the content as offensive propaganda and are demanding its immediate removal to prevent further distrust between the two nations.
amharic: የፊሊፒንስ መንግስት በቻይና ዴይሊ የታተመውን እና ፊሊፒንስን በአሜሪካ እና በጃፓን የምትመራ ዝንጀሮ አድርጎ የሚያሳይ አድሎአዊ የቪዲዮ ይዘት በጽኑ አውግዟል። ይህ ድርጊት የተፈጸመው በደቡብ ቻይና ባህር ላይ ባለው የድንበር ውዝግብ መሃል ሲሆን፣ ቻይና የፊሊፒንስ መርከቦች ላይ የውሃ ኃይል መጠቀምዋ ውጥረቱን አባብሶታል። የፊሊፒንስ ባለስልጣናት ይዘቱ አጸያፊ የፕሮፓጋንዳ ስራ መሆኑን በመግለጽ፣ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለውን አለመተማመን ስለሚጨምር ቪዲዮው በአስቸኳይ እንዲወገድ ጠይቀዋል።
oromo: Mootummaan Filippiins viidiyoo 'China Daily' irratti bahe, kan Filippiins akka jinfuu Ameerikaa fi Jaappaniin to’atamtuutti agarsiisu akka gocha wal-qixxummaa hin qabneetti balaaleffateera. Viidiyoon kun kan bahe wal-dhabdee daangaa galaana Chaayinaa Kibbaa keessatti adeemaa jiru keessatti yoo ta'u, Chaayinaan bidiruuwwan Filippiins irratti hidda bishaanii fayyadamuun isaanii wal-dhabdee kana daran hammaachiiseera. Hojjettoonni mootummaa Filippiins gocha kana qeeqa sukkanneessaa fi dogoggoraa jechuun, wal-amanuu dhabuu biyyoota lamaanii waan fiduuf viidiyoon kun hatattamaan akka haqamu gaafataniiru.

title: China’s Xi says AI ‘should not be a solo performance by a single country’
english: Chinese President Xi Jinping recently called for global collaboration in artificial intelligence, arguing that the technology should not be controlled by just one nation. Speaking at a conference in Shanghai, he stressed the need for a people-centered approach and promised to help developing countries access AI opportunities to ensure fairness. Xi also criticized the use of national security as a justification for restricting technological trade between countries.
amharic: የቻይናው ፕሬዚዳንት ዢ ጂንፒንግ አርቴፊሻል ኢንተለጀንስ በአንድ ሀገር ብቻ ቁጥጥር ስር መሆን እንደሌለበት በመግለጽ ዓለም አቀፍ ትብብር እንደሚያስፈልግ አሳሰቡ። በሻንጋይ በተካሄደ ጉባኤ ላይ ንግግር ያደረጉት ዢ፣ ቴክኖሎጂው ሰዎችን ማዕከል ያደረገ እንዲሆን እና በማደግ ላይ ያሉ ሀገራትም ተጠቃሚ እንዲሆኑ እንደሚሰሩ ገልጸዋል። በተጨማሪም ብሔራዊ ደኅንነትን እንደ ምክንያት በመጠቀም በቴክኖሎጂ ንግድ ላይ የሚጣሉ ገደቦችን ተቃውመዋል።
oromo: Preezidaantiin Chaayinaa Xi Jiinpingiing, teeknooloojii 'artifiishal intelejensi' biyya tokko qofaan to'atamuu akka hin qabneefi guddina isaa irratti hirmaannaa idil-addunyaa akka barbaachisu ibsaniiru. Magaalaa Shaanghaayitti walgahii irratti dubbachaa, teeknooloojiin kun namoota irratti xiyyeeffachuu akka qabuufi biyyoonni guddachaa jiranis carraa kana akka argatan kan hojjetan ta'uu himaniiru. Dabalataanis, nageenya biyyaa sababeeffachuudhaan daldala teeknooloojii irratti gufuu uumuun sirrii akka hin taane dubbataniiru.

title: Texas floods ravage through southwestern areas of state
english: Severe flooding has struck the Hill Country region of Texas, resulting in at least two fatalities. Emergency responders have successfully rescued more than 200 people trapped by the rising waters. Governor Greg Abbott confirmed that the victims were caught in their vehicles during the intense flash floods.
