amharic: በቴክሳስ ሂል ካውንቲ አካባቢ በተከሰተ ከፍተኛ የጎርፍ አደጋ ቢያንስ ሁለት ሰዎች ሕይወታቸው አልፏል። የነፍስ አድን ሠራተኞች በጎርፍ ተይዘው የነበሩ ከ200 በላይ ሰዎችን ማዳን ችለዋል። የቴክሳስ ገዢ ግሬግ አቦት እንደተናገሩት፣ አደጋው የተከሰተው ጎርፍ ተጎጂዎችን በመኪና ውስጥ እያሉ በመውሰዱ ነው።
oromo: Naannoo Hill Country kan Texas keessatti lolaan cimaan mudatee lubbuun namoota lamaa darbeera. Hojjettoonni gargaarsaa namoota 200 ol ta'an kan bishaanin marfamanii turan oolchuu danda'aniiru. Giddu galeessa lolaa kana keessatti namoonni kun kan du'an konkolaata isaanii keessatti osoo jiranii bishaanin fudhatamanii akka ta'e bulchaan Texas Greg Abbott mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Key takeaways from Donald Trump’s controversial speech on election security
english: US President Donald Trump recently delivered a speech questioning the integrity of the American electoral system and accusing China of hacking voter data. Despite his claims of government conspiracies and election interference, he failed to provide verifiable evidence to support his accusations. Critics and experts argue these statements are misleading and aim to undermine public trust in democratic processes ahead of the upcoming midterms.
amharic: የአሜሪካው ፕሬዚዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በቅርቡ ባደረጉት ንግግር በአሜሪካ የምርጫ ሥርዓት ላይ ጥርጣሬ የፈጠሩ ሲሆን ቻይና የምርጫ መረጃዎችን ሰርቃለች ብለው ከሰዋል። ምንም እንኳን ትራምፕ የመንግስት ሴራ እና የምርጫ ጣልቃ ገብነት አለ ቢሉም፣ ለንግግራቸው አሳማኝ ማስረጃ ማቅረብ አልቻሉም። ተቺዎች እና ባለሙያዎች ይህ ንግግር በህዝብ ዘንድ በምርጫ ሂደቱ ላይ ያላቸውን እምነት ለመሸርሸር የታለመ እና ሀሰተኛ መረጃ የያዘ ነው ሲሉ ይተቻሉ።
oromo: Pirezidaantiin Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraamp dhiheenya kana haasaa taasisaniin, sirna filannoo biyyattii irratti shakkiin akka uumamu kan godhan yoo ta'u, Chaayinaan daataa sagalee kennitootaa hattee jirti jechuun himatan. Tiraamp gareewwan mootummaa keessa jiran dhoksaa raawwataniiru jedhanii kan himatan ta'us, himata isaaniif ragaa qabatamaa dhiheessuu hin dandeenye. Qeequun fi ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, haasaan kun amantii ummataa sirna demokraasii irratti qaban laaffisuuf kan yaadamee fi odeeffannoo dhuga-maleessa ta'e of keessaa qabu jedhaniiru.

title: US bombards Iran in sixth-straight night of attacks
english: The United States has continued its military campaign against Iran for the sixth consecutive night. These recent operations have targeted public infrastructure, including airports and bridges, extending the scope of strikes deeper into the country. This escalation follows through on previous warnings from the U.S. government regarding its military intentions in the region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግስት በኢራን ላይ የሚያደርገውን ጥቃት ለስድስተኛ ተከታታይ ቀን ቀጥሏል። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች ድልድዮችን እና አየር ማረፊያዎችን ጨምሮ የሲቪል መሰረተ ልማቶችን ኢላማ ያደረጉ ሲሆን፣ ዘመቻውም ወደ ኢራን ግዛት ጥልቀት እየተስፋፋ ነው። ይህ እርምጃ አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ እንደምትወስድ ቀደም ሲል የሰጠችውን ማስጠንቀቂያ ተከትሎ የመጣ ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa haleellaa isaa kan biyya Iran irratti gaggeessaa jiru guyyaa ja’affeef itti fufee jira. Haleellaan kun bu’uuraalee misoomaa kanneen akka buufata xiyyaaraa fi daandiiwwan ce’umsaa irratti kan xiyyeeffate yoo ta’u, gochi kun gara keessa biyyattii gadi fageenyaan babal’achaa jira. Tarkaanfiin kunis akeekkachiisa Ameerikaan kanaan dura haleellaa waraanaa irratti kennite hordofee kan dhufe dha.

title: Israeli settlers attack Sinjil town in occupied West Bank
english: Israeli settlers recently carried out an attack on the outskirts of Sinjil, a town located in the occupied West Bank. Local residents report that the community is suffering from isolation due to frequent military raids and the installation of roadblocks. These actions have severely restricted movement and hindered daily life for those living in the area.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሰፈራ ነዋሪዎች በተያዘው የምዕራብ ባንክ በምትገኘው ሲንጂል ከተማ ዳርቻ ላይ ጥቃት ሰንዝረዋል። የአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች እንደሚናገሩት ከተማዋ በተደጋጋሚ በሚደረጉ ወታደራዊ ወረራዎች እና በመንገድ መዘጋት ምክንያት ተገልላ ትገኛለች። እነዚህ ድርጊቶች በከተማዋ ለሚኖሩ ነዋሪዎች የዕለት ተዕለት እንቅስቃሴ እና የመንቀሳቀስ ነፃነት ላይ ከፍተኛ ችግር ፈጥረዋል።
oromo: Warreen buufata Israa'el qubachiisan gandoota magaalaa Sinjiil kan naannoo Lixaa Qabame jiru irratti haleellaa raawwataniiru. Jiraattonni naannichaa akka jedhanitti, magaalaan isaanii waraanni Israa'el deddeebisee haleelluu fi daandiiwwan cufuun isaa kan irraa adda baasee jiru ta'uu ibsaniiru. Gochootni kun jiraattota naannichaa irratti sosocho'uu dhorkuudhaan jireenya guyyuu isaanii irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisee jira.

title: Child wounded during 'interception operations': Qatar’s Ministry of Interior
english: A child in Qatar was injured by falling debris after the country's military intercepted several aerial attacks. Residents near the capital, Doha, reported hearing loud explosions during the defensive operations. The government confirmed that the child is now being treated for their injuries.
amharic: የኳታር መከላከያ ኃይሎች በሀገሪቱ ላይ የተሰነዘሩ የአየር ጥቃቶችን በመከላከል ላይ እያሉ በወደቀ ፍርስራሽ ምክንያት አንድ ህጻን መጎዳቱን የሀገሪቱ የውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር አስታወቀ። በዋና ከተማዋ ዶሃ አካባቢ ተከታታይ የፍንዳታ ድምፆች ተሰምተው ነበር። ጉዳት የደረሰበት ህጻን በአሁኑ ወቅት የህክምና ክትትል እየተደረገለት እንደሚገኝ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Mootummaan Qaxar akka ibsetti, loltoonni biyyattii haleellaa qilleensa irraa dhufan ittisuu isaaniin walqabatee, kosii fi caccabni meeshaalee waraanaa bu'een daa'imni tokko miidhameera. Magaala guddittii Dohaa keessatti sagaleen dhukaatii dhagahamee ture. Daa'imni miidhame kunis amma yaala barbaachisaa ta'e argachaa jiraachuu ibsameera.

title: China and Pakistan urge resumption of US-Iran peace talks
english: The foreign ministers of China and Pakistan have collectively called for an immediate ceasefire and the restart of diplomatic negotiations between the United States and Iran. They emphasized that both nations need to honor their previous agreements and follow the terms of their existing memorandum. This joint appeal aims to de-escalate tensions and restore peace through active dialogue.
amharic: የቻይና እና የፓኪስታን የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትሮች በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል የተኩስ አቁም እንዲደረግና ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ውይይቶች እንዲቀጥሉ ጠይቀዋል። ሁለቱ ሀገራት ሁሉም ወገኖች ቀደም ሲል የገቡትን ቃልኪዳን እንዲያከብሩና በተፈረመው የመግባቢያ ሰነድ መሰረት እንዲንቀሳቀሱ አሳስበዋል። ይህ ጥሪ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለውን ውጥረት ለመቀነስ እና በውይይት ሰላምን ለመፍጠር ያለመ ነው።
oromo: Ministiroonni dhimma alaa Chaayinaa fi Paakistaan walitti dhufeenyi Amerikaa fi Iraan gidduu jiru tasgabbaa'ee, mariin nageenyaa akka deebi'ee jalqabu gaafataniiru. Mootummoonni kunneen lamaan, gurguddoonni kun kakuu duraan seenan akka kabajanii fi waliigaltee duraan irra ga'an akka hordofan jabeessanii ibsaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kunis walitti bu'iinsa jiru tasgabbeessuufi marii karaa nageenya qabuun furuuf kan kaayyeffatedha.

title: Morning update
english: Tensions between the US and Iran have escalated significantly following deadly American airstrikes in southern Iran and retaliatory attacks by the Iranian Revolutionary Guard on a US base in Syria. While Iran has warned neighboring countries against hosting US military operations, the White House maintains that it remains open to diplomatic solutions. Meanwhile, global energy officials have expressed concern over the stability of oil transport through the Strait of Hormuz amid the worsening regional conflict.
amharic: በደቡብ ኢራን በተፈጸሙ የአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃቶች እና ኢራን በሶሪያ በሚገኝ የአሜሪካ የጦር ሰፈር በወሰደችው የበቀል እርምጃ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለው ውጥረት አድጓል። ኢራን ጎረቤት አገራት የአሜሪካን ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴ እንዲያስተናግዱ በማስጠንቀቅ ላይ ስትሆን፣ ዋይት ሀውስ በበኩሉ ለዲፕሎማሲያዊ መፍትሄዎች ክፍት መሆኑን አስታውቋል። በአካባቢው የተፈጠረው አለመረጋጋት በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት በኩል የሚደረገውን የነዳጅ ማጓጓዣ ስራ አደጋ ላይ እንደሚጥል የዓለም አቀፍ የኢነርጂ ተቋማት ስጋታቸውን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Humni waraana Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduu jiru erga Ameerikaan kibba Iraanitti haleellaa raawwattee fi Iraanis sanatti deebisuun buufata waraana Ameerikaa kan Suuriyaa keessatti argamu haleeltee booda hammaachaa dhufeera. Iraan biyyoonni ollaas ta'e kanneen biroo buufata waraana Ameerikaatiif bakka akka hin kennine akeekkachiisaa jirti; ta'us, mana maree adii (White House) gama isaatiin mariidhaan furmaata argachuuf fedhii akka qaban ibseera. Kutaaleen addunyaa kanneen anniisaa irratti hojjetan immoo, walitti bu'iinsi kun daandii boba'aan itti darbu kan 'Strait of Hormuz' jedhamu irratti dhiibbaa geessisuu akka danda'u yaaddoo qaban ibsaniiru.

title: IRGC says it targeted US radar in Oman
english: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) of Iran has announced that it launched an operation against a United States maritime radar system located in Oman. This development highlights ongoing regional tensions involving Iranian military forces and American equipment. No further details regarding the extent of the damage or the specific timing of the incident were provided.
amharic: የኢራኑ እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይል በኦማን የሚገኝ የአሜሪካ የባህር ላይ የክትትል ራዳር ኢላማ ማድረጉን አስታውቋል። ይህ ክስተት በኢራን ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች እና በአሜሪካ መሣሪያዎች መካከል ያለውን ውጥረት ያሳያል። ስለደረሰው ጉዳት መጠን ወይም ስለ ጥቃቱ ትክክለኛ ጊዜ ተጨማሪ መረጃ አልተሰጠም።
oromo: Humnoonni Waraana Iran (IRGC) biyyi isaanii raadaara to'annoo galaanaarraa kan Ameerikaa biyya Omaani keessatti argamu irratti haleellaa raawwachuu isaanii ibsaniiru. Gochi kun walitti bu'iinsa humnoota Iran fi meeshaalee waraana Ameerikaa gidduutti mul'atu agarsiisa. Gahiinsa miidhaa qaqqabe ykn yeroo sirrii haleellaa kanaa ilaalchisee odeeffannoon dabalataa hin kennamne.

title: Jordan says it intercepted three Iranian missiles
english: The Jordanian military successfully blocked three Iranian missiles that were aimed at their territory. Officials confirmed that the interception was effective, resulting in no injuries or property destruction. The situation remains under control with no reported damage to the country.
amharic: የዮርዳኖስ ወታደራዊ ኃይል ወደ ሀገሪቱ የተተኮሱ ሶስት የኢራን ሚሳኤሎችን በተሳካ ሁኔታ መትቶ መጣል ችሏል። ባለስልጣናት እንደገለጹት፣ ይህ የመከላከያ እርምጃ ምንም አይነት የሰው ህይወት መጥፋት ወይም የንብረት ውድመት ሳያስከትል ተጠናቋል። ሁኔታው አሁን በቁጥጥር ስር ውሎ ምንም አይነት ጉዳት አልደረሰም።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Yordaanos meeshaalee waraanaa gara biyyattii dhufaa turan sadii kan Iran ta'an milkaa'inaan kuffisee jira. Mootummaan akka ibsetti, tarkaanfichi miidhaa lubbuus ta'e qabeenyaa tokko malee xumurameera. Yeroo ammaa haalli jiru to'annoo jala kan jiru yoo ta'u, miidhaan ga'e hin jiru.

title: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?
english: Two boats carrying over 500 Rohingya asylum seekers from Myanmar went missing in late June and are feared to have capsized due to dangerous monsoon conditions. Experts believe the vessels were not fit for the sea, and the recovery of several bodies suggests there were likely no survivors among the passengers, many of whom were women and children. This tragedy highlights the desperate situation for the Rohingya, who are attempting to flee conflict and persecution in their homeland.
amharic: ከማያንማር ከ500 በላይ የሮሂንጋ ጥገኝነት ጠያቂዎችን የጫኑ ሁለት ጀልባዎች ሰኔ መጨረሻ ላይ ከጠፉ በኋላ በኃይለኛ የዝናብ ወቅት ማዕበል ሰጥመው ሊሆን እንደሚችል ተሰግቷል። እነዚህ ጀልባዎች ለጉዞ ብቁ እንዳልነበሩና በውስጣቸው የነበሩት ሴቶችና ህጻናትን ጨምሮ አብዛኞቹ በሕይወት የመትረፍ ዕድላቸው ጠባብ እንደሆነ ባለሙያዎች ይናገራሉ። ይህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት በሀገራቸው ግጭትና ስደት የሚደርስባቸው የሮሂንጋ ሕዝብ ያለውን አስከፊ ሁኔታ በግልጽ የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Namoota nagaa roohiingaa 500 ol ta'an fe'anii biyya Miyaanmaar irraa ka'an dooniileen lama Sadaasa dhumaa irraa eegalee badanii jiru; haala qilleensa cimaa fi rooba bokkaa jabaa kanaan walqabatee dooniileen kunneen gadi gombifamanii akka jiran shakkama. Dooniileen kunneen imalaaf kan hin taane fi rakkoo hamaa keessa kan turan ta'uu isaa fi namoonni keessa turan, kanneen keessattuu dubartootaa fi daa'imman, lubbuun hafuun isaanii baay'ee ulfaataa akka ta'e ogeeyyiin ibsu. Balaan kun rakkoo fi ari'atamni namoota Roohiingaa biyya isaanii keessatti mudataa jiru hangam hamaa akka ta'e kan agarsiisu dha.

title: China rebukes UK over nationalisation of British Steel
english: The British government has officially taken full ownership of British Steel, the country’s final primary steel producer, to prevent its closure and protect thousands of jobs. Beijing has strongly criticized this takeover, claiming it unfairly harms the interests of the Chinese firm Jingye and discourages future Chinese investment in the UK. In response, China has urged the British government to honor its investment protection agreements and warned that they will support the affected company in seeking justice.
amharic: የብሪታንያ መንግስት የመጨረሻውን የብረት ማምረቻ ድርጅት የሆነውን ብሪቲሽ ስቲልን ሙሉ በሙሉ በቁጥጥሩ ስር አውሎታል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው ድርጅቱ እንዳይዘጋ እና በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ የሥራ ዕድሎችን ለመጠበቅ ነው። ቤጂንግ ይህን የብሪታንያ ውሳኔ በመቃወም፣ የቻይናው ባለቤት የሆነው ጂንግዬ ኩባንያ መብቶች እንደተጣሱ እና በብሪታንያ ላይ የነበረውን የቻይና ኢንቨስትመንት እንደሚጎዳ ገልጻለች።
oromo: Mootummaan Biritish, dhaabbata sibilaa biyyattii isa dhumaa ta'e 'British Steel' jedhamu guutummaatti of harka galfateera. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame dhaabbatichi akka hin cufamne fi hojjettoota kumaatama ta'an eeguufi. Beijin, tarkaanfii mootummaan Biritish fudhate kana cimsee balaaleffachuun, mirgi dhaabbata Chaayinaa 'Jingye' akka sarbame fi amantaa invastimantii Chaayinaa biyyattii keessatti qabdu akka miidhu ibseera.

title: Which players are favourites to be FIFA World Cup 2026 award winners?
english: As the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaches its final, football icons Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé are the primary candidates for major individual honors. Key awards include the Golden Boot for top goalscorer, the Golden Ball for the tournament's best player, and several others acknowledging defensive, fair play, and goal-scoring excellence. Winners are determined based on their performance, statistics, and expert voting as the competition concludes.
amharic: የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ወደ ፍጻሜው ሲቃረብ፣ ሊዮኔል ሜሲ እና ኪሊያን ኤምባፔ ለታላላቅ የውድድሩ ግለሰብ ሽልማቶች ቀዳሚ እጩዎች ሆነዋል። ሽልማቶቹ ከፍተኛ ግብ አስቆጣሪ ለሚሆነው 'ጎልደን ቡት'፣ ለውድድሩ ምርጥ ተጫዋች ለሚሰጠው 'ጎልደን ቦል' እና ለሌሎች የዲሲፕሊን እና የክህሎት እውቅናዎች የተዘጋጁ ናቸው። አሸናፊዎቹ የሚለዩት በውድድሩ ባሳዩት ብቃት፣ ባስመዘገቡት ውጤት እና በባለሙያዎች ድምጽ መሰረት ይሆናል።
oromo: Waliqixxee FIFA World Cup bara 2026 gara xumuraatti yommuu dhihaatu, taphattoonni beekamoon Lionel Messi fi Kylian Mbappe badhaasa dhuunfaa gurguddaa injifachuuf filatamoo ta'aniiru. Badhaasota kanneen keessaa qabxii ol aanaa galchuuf kan kennamu 'Golden Boot', taphattoota hundarra caalan filachuuf kan kennamu 'Golden Ball' fi kanneen biroo ni argamu. Injifattoonni badhaasota kanaa qophiiwwan gara garaa irratti taphni isaanii akkam akka ture, galata lakkoofsaa fi murtii hayyoonni dabarsan irratti hundaawanii filamu.

title: Iranian sources say US strikes hit civilian infrastructure
english: Local Iranian sources report that recent United States airstrikes have damaged civilian facilities, including an airport and a bridge, resulting in casualties. Conversely, the American military maintains that these ongoing daily operations are strictly intended to weaken Iran's military power. The situation remains a point of contention between the conflicting claims of the two nations.
amharic: የኢራን ምንጮች እንደገለጹት በቅርቡ የተካሄዱት የአሜሪካ የአየር ጥቃቶች በሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጉዳት አድርሰዋል፤ ይህም አየር ማረፊያንና ድልድይን ጨምሮ ለሰው ህይወት መጥፋት ምክንያት ሆኗል። በሌላ በኩል የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ አመራሮች ጥቃቶቹ የኢራንን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም የታለሙ መሆናቸውን ይገልጻሉ። በሁለቱ ወገኖች መካከል ያለው የይገባኛል ጥያቄ እና የጥቃት አላማ ግጭት ቀጥሏል።
oromo: Maddoonni Iiraan akka gabaasanitti, qilleensarraa haleellaa Ameerikaan gaggeessiteen bu'uuraalee misoomaa kanneen akka buufata xiyyaaraa fi daandii gurguddaa miidhuun lubbuun namootaa akka darbu taasisera. Gama biraatiin, waraanni Ameerikaa haleellaan kun kan gaggeeffamaa jiru dandeettii waraana Iiraan laaffisuuf qofa akka ta'e ibsa. Haalli kun lachuu gidduutti wal dhabdee fi ibsa wal faallessuu irra gaha jira.

title: IEA chief warns Strait of Hormuz crisis threatens global energy security
english: The head of the International Energy Agency, Fatih Birol, has expressed deep concern that the escalating military conflict between the US and Iran is jeopardizing global oil supplies. With Iran maintaining a closure of the vital Strait of Hormuz following repeated US airstrikes, energy security has become a critical international issue. The current collapse of ceasefire efforts and ongoing regional attacks pose a significant risk to the stability of global energy markets.
amharic: የዓለም አቀፉ የኢነርጂ ኤጀንሲ ኃላፊ ፋቲህ ቢሮል፣ በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው ወታደራዊ ግጭት የዓለምን የነዳጅ አቅርቦት አደጋ ላይ ጥሎታል ሲሉ አስጠንቅቀዋል። ኢራን በየጊዜው በሚሰነዘርባት የአየር ጥቃት ሳቢያ ወሳኙን የሆርሙዝ ስትሬት ዘግታ መቆየቷ የዓለም የኢነርጂ ደህንነትን ለከፍተኛ ስጋት ዳርጎታል። የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነቶች መፍረስ እና እየተባባሰ የመጣው የክልሉ ግጭት በዓለም አቀፍ የኢነርጂ ገበያ ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ እያሳደረ ይገኛል።
oromo: Hogganaan dhaabbata Inarjii addunyaa, Fatih Birol, walitti bu’iinsi waraanaa Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduutti uumame dhiyeessii boba’aa addunyaa miidhuu akka danda’u akeekkachiisaniiru. Iraan haleellaa qilleensa Ameerikaa hordofee daandii boba’aa idil-addunyaa barbaachisaa ta’e kan Hormuz cuftee itti fufuun ishee nageenya inarjii addunyaaf yaaddoo guddaa ta’eera. Yaaliin waraana dhaabuu fashaluu fi haleellaan naannichatti itti fufe gabaa inarjii addunyaa irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisuu danda’a.

title: Goa’s forgotten orchata drink lives on in family kitchens
english: Orchata, a traditional almond-based drink once popular among elite Catholic families in Goa, is currently being kept alive by local households. Although the beverage had nearly vanished from public memory after commercial production ceased in the 1990s, families are now recreating the recipe from memory to preserve their cultural heritage. Today, it serves as a nostalgic link to past weddings, religious feasts, and childhood summers.
amharic: በጎዋ፣ ህንድ፣ በአንድ ወቅት በባለጸጋ ካቶሊክ ቤተሰቦች ዘንድ ተወዳጅ የነበረው ‘ኦርቻታ’ የተባለው የአልሞንድ መጠጥ በቤተሰቦች ጥረት እየተጠበቀ ይገኛል። በ1990ዎቹ የንግድ ምርትነቱ ቢቆምም፣ አሁን ላይ ያሉ የጎዋ ነዋሪዎች የድሮ ትዝታቸውን በመጠቀም መጠጡን በቤታቸው እያዘጋጁት ነው። ይህ መጠጥ ካለፉት የሰርግ በዓላት፣ የሃይማኖታዊ ክብረ በዓላት እና የልጅነት ትዝታዎች ጋር በማገናኘት የባህል ቅርሳቸውን ለመጠበቅ ይረዳል።
oromo: Gosa dhugaatii badhaadhinaa kan almoodii irraa hojjetamu kan ‘Orchata’ jedhamu fi durii naannoo Go’aa keessatti maatiiwwan Kaatolikii biratti beekamu, har’a maatiiwwan aadaa kana tiksuun jiraachisaa jiru. Dhugaatiin kun erga bara 1990moota keessa gabaa irraa baduu jalqabee booda, maatiiwwan yaannoo isaanii irraa qaban fayyadamuun mana isaanii keessatti qopheeffachaa jiru. Har’a, dhugaatiin kun sirnoota gaa’elaa, ayyaanota amantii fi yaadannoo ijoollummaa kan durii walitti fiduun aadaa isaanii eeggachaa jiru.

title: Iran war live: US carries out strikes on civilian infrastructure in south
english: For the sixth consecutive night, the United States has conducted military strikes against Iran. These recent attacks targeted civilian infrastructure in the southern city of Bandar Abbas, specifically damaging a train station and local power systems. Meanwhile, Iranian authorities have stated that the Strait of Hormuz will remain under heightened security and will not return to its previous operating status.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለስድስተኛ ተከታታይ ቀን በኢራን ላይ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሟን ቀጥላለች። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች በባንደር አባስ ከተማ በሚገኙ የባቡር ጣቢያ እና የኤሌክትሪክ መሰረተ ልማቶች ላይ ያነጣጠሩ ናቸው። በሌላ በኩል የኢራን ባለስልጣናት የሆርሙዝ ባህረ ሰላጤ ወደ ቀድሞ ሁኔታው እንደማይመለስ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Ameerikaan guyyaa ja'affaa walitti aansuudhaan weerara waraanaa Iran irratti gaggeessaa jirti. Weerarrichi magaalota kibba Iran keessatti bu'uuraalee misoomaa kanneen akka buufata baaburaa fi tajaajila humna ibsaa miidheera. Gamtaan, mootummaan Iran daandiin bishaanii Hormuz gara haala duriitti akka hin deebine ibseera.

title: Venezuela earthquake: Number of known dead rises to nearly 5,000 victims
english: Nearly 5,000 people have been confirmed dead following two powerful earthquakes in Venezuela last month. The United Nations warns that approximately 50,000 individuals remain missing, with many likely trapped beneath the debris. While relief efforts are underway, survivors report that government assistance has been sluggish and insufficient, further complicated by ongoing international economic sanctions.
amharic: ባለፈው ወር በቬንዙዌላ በተከሰቱ ሁለት ኃይለኛ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጦች ወደ 5,000 የሚጠጉ ሰዎች መሞታቸው ተረጋግጧል። የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት እንደገለጸው፣ እስካሁን ወደ 50,000 የሚጠጉ ሰዎች የት እንዳሉ አይታወቅም፤ ብዙዎቹም በፍርስራሽ ስር የተቀበሩ ሊሆኑ እንደሚችሉ ይሰጋል። የእርዳታ ስራዎች እየተከናወኑ ቢሆንም፣ በሀገሪቱ ላይ በተጣለው የኢኮኖሚ ማዕቀብ እና በመንግስት በኩል ያለው ምላሽ ዘገምተኛ በመሆኑ የተረፉት ወገኖች ከፍተኛ ችግር ላይ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Ji'a darbe biyya Veenezuweelaatti sochiin lafaa humna guddaa qabu lama mudatee ture, lakkoofsi namoota du'anii hanga 5,000 ga'eera. Dhaabbanni Mootummoota Gamtoomanii akka ibsetti, namoonni 50,000 ol ta'an iddoo buuteen isaanii dhabameera; hedduun isaanii immoo daaraa fi caccabaa manaa jala jiru jedhamee sodaatama. Tattaaffiin gargaarsa namootaa itti fufus, mootummaan gargaarsa saffisaa gochuu dhabuu fi uggurri diinagdee biyyoota alaa rakkoo jiru kana daran ulfeesseera.

title: Vietnamese activist Bao Ngoc places rare national spotlight on Gaza
english: Bao Ngoc, a 28-year-old activist from Ho Chi Minh City, has gained significant attention for being the first Vietnamese national to join an international flotilla attempting to deliver aid to Gaza. Her journey sparked widespread support among young people in Vietnam, a country where public political protest is typically restricted. After Israeli forces intercepted her vessel in international waters, she was detained, prompting urgent calls for the Vietnamese government to secure her release.
amharic: ባኦ ንጎክ የተባለች የ28 ዓመት የቬትናም አክቲቪስት ወደ ጋዛ እርዳታ ለማድረስ በተደረገ አለም አቀፍ ጉዞ በመሳተፏ ከፍተኛ ትኩረትን ስባለች። በቬትናም የፖለቲካ ተቃውሞዎች በጥብቅ በሚቆጣጠሩበት ሁኔታ፣ ይህ የሰብአዊ ድጋፍ ጥረቷ በሀገሪቱ ወጣቶች ዘንድ ትልቅ ድጋፍ አግኝቷል። የእስራኤል ኃይሎች በዓለም አቀፍ የባህር ክልል ውስጥ መርከቧን በመጥለፍ እሷን በቁጥጥር ስር ማዋላቸውን ተከትሎ፣ የቬትናም መንግስት ለነጻነቷ እንዲሰራ ጥሪዎች እየቀረቡ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Bao Ngoc, guddattuu umrii waggaa 28 kan taate, doonii gargaarsa gara Gaazaatti imaltu irratti hirmaachuun ishee xiyyeeffannoo guddaa argatteetti. Biyya Itoophiyaa irraa adda ta’ee, Vietnam keessatti mormiin siyaasaa gadi qabamee waan jiruuf, gochi ishee kun dargaggoota biyyattii biratti deggarsa guddaa argateera. Humnoonni Israa'el doonii ishee garba keessatti qabanii hidhuu isaanii hordofee, mootummaan Vietnam akka ishee hiisisuuf dhiibbaan godhamaa jira.

title: US hit on Iran's Iranshahr Airport causes damage, wounds one
english: A missile strike attributed to the US has damaged Iranshahr Airport in Iran's Sistan and Baluchestan province. The attack resulted in injuries to one civilian and caused significant destruction to local infrastructure, including a fuel tank and the power supply. Consequently, the airport is currently facing a blackout due to the reported damage.
amharic: በኢራን ሲስታን እና ባሉቼስታን ግዛት በሚገኘው የኢራንሻህር አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ ላይ በአሜሪካ ተፈጸመ በተባለ ጥቃት አንድ ሰው ቆስሏል። የጥቃቱ ሰለባ የሆነው አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ የነዳጅ ማጠራቀሚያ እና የኤሌክትሪክ መሰረተ ልማቶች በመጎዳታቸው የኤሌክትሪክ መቆራረጥ አጋጥሞታል።
oromo: Humni Ameerikaa buufata xiyyaaraa Iranshahr kan mootummaa Iraan keessatti argamu irratti haleellaa raawwataniin namni tokko miidhameera. Haleellaa kanaan buufata xiyyaaraa sana keessatti qabeenyi miidhamee, akkasumas laampheen ibsaa fi bakki kuusaa boba'aa manca'uun humna ibsaa hir'ateera.

title: Kuwait army says confronting 'hostile' attacks, air raid sirens blare in Bahrain
english: Kuwait's military is actively engaging with incoming missile and drone threats originating from Iran. Meanwhile, Bahrain has activated air raid sirens across the country after Iran claimed to have attacked U.S. military aircraft at a local base. Authorities in both nations have advised residents to stay calm and follow emergency safety protocols.
amharic: የክዌይት ወታደራዊ ኃይል ከኢራን የተሰነዘሩ የሚሳኤል እና የድሮን ጥቃቶችን እየመከተ መሆኑን አስታውቋል። በሌላ በኩል በባህሬን የኢራን ኃይሎች የአሜሪካን አውሮፕላኖች ማጥቃታቸውን ተከትሎ የደህንነት ማስጠንቀቂያ ሳይረኖች ተሰምተዋል። ሁለቱም ሀገራት ዜጎቻቸው መረጋጋትን እንዲጠብቁ እና የደህንነት መመሪያዎችን እንዲከተሉ አሳስበዋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Kuweyt weerara misaa'elaa fi tiroonii Iraan irraa isaan irra ga'aa jiru akka of irraa ittisaa jiran beeksisaniiru. Gama biraatiin, Iraan buufata xiyyaaraa Baahireen keessa jiru irratti miidhaa geessisuu ishee erga beeksistee booda, biyyattiin sagalee akeekkachiisaa fiixee hatattamaa dhageessifteetti. Mootummoonni lamaanuu lammiileen isaanii tasgabbii akka eeggatan fi qajeelfamoota nageenyaa akka hordofan dhaamaniiru.

title: Qatar rejects Israeli reports of military action against Iran
english: Qatar has officially denied claims from Israeli media that it agreed to take part in military strikes against Iran. Doha stated that these reports are completely untrue and are designed to damage its reputation as a neutral mediator in the region. The government emphasized that such misinformation attempts to compromise its diplomatic efforts.
amharic: ኳታር ከኢራን ጋር በሚደረግ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ ለመሳተፍ ተስማምታለች በሚል የእስራኤል መገናኛ ብዙኃን ያሰራጩትን መረጃ ውድቅ አድርጋለች። የኳታር መንግሥት እነዚህ ዘገባዎች ከእውነት የራቁ እና በአካባቢው ገለልተኛ አማላጅ ሆና የምታደርገውን ጥረት ለማዳከም የታቀዱ ናቸው ብሏል። ሀገሪቱ በዲፕሎማሲያዊ ሚናዋ ላይ የተሳሳተ መረጃ ለማሰራጨት የሚደረገውን ጥረት አውግዛለች።
oromo: Qatar gabaasa miidiyaaleen Israa'el Iranirratti tarkaanfii waraanaa fudhachuuf walii galtee irra geenye jedhanii baasan dhugaa akka hin taane ibsiteetti. Doha himannaan kun kan dhugaarraa fagaatee fi gahee isheen giddu-gala taatee araarsummaarratti qabdu xureessuuf kan yaadame akka ta'e ibsite. Mootummaan Qatar odeeffannoon sobaa kun carraaqqii isheen diippilomaasii irratti gootu gufachiisuuf kan karoorfame ta'uu beeksisiteetti.

title: Sadiq Khan joins House of Lords as outgoing UK PM names 26 new peers
english: Outgoing British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has appointed London Mayor Sadiq Khan and 25 others to life peerages in the House of Lords. This move serves as one of Starmer's final official actions before transitioning leadership to Andy Burnham. The new cohort of peers includes a diverse group of figures from the military, business, and various advocacy sectors who will now participate in reviewing and voting on national legislation.
amharic: የዩናይትድ ኪንግደም ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ኬይር ስታርመር ሥልጣናቸውን ከመልቀቃቸው በፊት የለንደን ከንቲባ ሳዲቅ ካንን ጨምሮ 26 ሰዎችን የላይኛው ምክር ቤት (House of Lords) አባል አድርገው ሾሙ። እነዚህ ግለሰቦች በሕይወት ዘመናቸው በምክር ቤቱ ውስጥ በመቀመጥ አገራዊ ሕጎችን የመገምገም እና የመምረጥ ስልጣን ይኖራቸዋል። በአዲሱ ሹመት ውስጥ ከተለያዩ የሥራ ዘርፎች፣ ከሠራዊቱ እና ከሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋቾች የተውጣጡ ግለሰቦች ተካተዋል።
oromo: Muummee ministiraa biyya Ingiliz kan ta'an Keir Starmer, hojiisaanii gadhiisuun dura, kantiibaa London Sadiq Khan dabalatee namoota 26 gara mana maree olaanaa (House of Lords) muudaniiru. Namoonni kunneen jireenyasaanii guutuu mana maree kana keessa taa'uun, seera biyyattii gamaaggamuufi sagalee kennuuf mirga qabu. Muudamni kun namoota damee adda addaa, kanneen akka loltootaa, ogeeyyii dinagdeefi dhaabbilee mirga namoomaa irraa walitti babba'an kan hammateedha.

title: Blasts reported in Iran as US launches new wave of strikes
english: The United States military has carried out strikes in Iran for six consecutive nights, targeting military assets near the Strait of Hormuz. These attacks follow reports of Iranian strikes on American bases in the region as both nations struggle for control over the vital waterway. Despite the escalating conflict and the closure of the strait, the White House maintains that President Trump remains open to diplomatic negotiations.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በሆርሙዝ ባህረ ሰላጤ አካባቢ ያለውን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም በሚል ለስድስት ተከታታይ ቀናት በኢራን ላይ የአየር ጥቃት ፈጽመዋል። ይህ የእርስ በርስ ጥቃት የተከሰተው ሁለቱ ሀገራት በባህረ ሰላጤው ቁጥጥር ላይ በሚያደርጉት ግጭት ሳቢያ ነው። ግጭቱ እየተባባሰ እና የሆርሙዝ የባህር መስመር ለትራፊክ ተዘግቶ ቢቆይም፣ የአሜሪካ መንግስት ከኢራን ጋር በዲፕሎማሲያዊ መንገድ ለመነጋገር ዝግጁ መሆኑን ገልጿል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Ameerikaa garaa garummaa to'annoo galaana 'Strait of Hormuz' irratti waliin qaban irraa kan ka'e, guyyoota ja'aaf walitti aansuun Iiraan irratti weerara raawwachaa jiru. Hojiin waraanaa kun buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa kanneen biyyoota ollaa keessa jiran irratti haleellaa Iiraan gaggeessiteen hordofee kan dhufe dha. Giddu galeessi dhimma waraanaa Ameerikaa haleellaan kun dandeettii waraana Iiraan hir'isuuf kan yaadame ta'uu ibse. Haalli kun caalaatti kan hammaate ta'us, mootummaan Ameerikaa ammas marii dippiloomaasii irratti fedhii akka qabu beeksiseera.

title: Former Italian motorway chief sentenced over bridge collapse
english: Giovanni Castellucci, the former CEO of Italy's primary highway management company, has been sentenced to 12 years in prison. This follows the 2018 collapse of a bridge in Genoa that resulted in 43 fatalities. Victims' families expressed that the legal ruling validates their belief that the tragedy could have been avoided with proper oversight.
amharic: የጣሊያን ዋና የሀይዌይ አስተዳደር የቀድሞ ዋና ስራ አስፈፃሚ ጆቫኒ ካስቴሉቺ በ12 አመት እስራት ተቀጥተዋል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተላለፈው በ2018 በጄኖዋ ከተማ ውስጥ በደረሰው እና 43 ሰዎችን ለህልፈት የዳረገው የድልድይ መፍረስ አደጋን ተከትሎ ነው። የተጎጂዎች ቤተሰቦች ብይን አደጋው በቁጥጥር ማነስ ምክንያት የመጣ እና መከላከል የሚቻል እንደነበር የሚያረጋግጥ መሆኑን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Hogganaan duraanii dhaabbata daandiiwwan gurguddoo Xaaliyaanii, Jovaanii Kaastelluchii, hidhaa waggaa 12 itti murameera. Murtiin kun kan darbe, bara 2018 magaalaa Jeenoowaa keessatti darajaa 43 kan galaafate, buufanni daandii tokko kufuun isaa hordofee dha. Maatiin miidhamtootaa, murtiin kun balaan kun malaammaltummaa fi hordoffii dhabuu irraa kan dhufe fi ittisuun kan danda'amu ture jechuun ibsaniiru.

title: Ilhan Omar renews push for US to join ICC amid Trump pressure
english: Representative Ilhan Omar has introduced a resolution urging the United States to join the International Criminal Court, directly opposing the Trump administration's attempts to undermine the institution. This move follows threats from Secretary of State Marco Rubio to dismantle the court in response to its investigations into American and Israeli officials. Omar argues that the U.S. should lead by example in upholding global human rights instead of imposing sanctions on international judicial authorities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት አባል ኢልሃን ኦማር፣ አሜሪካ የአለም አቀፍ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤትን (ICC) እንድትቀላቀል የሚጠይቅ የውሳኔ ሃሳብ አቅርበዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የመጣው የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትሩ ማርኮ ሩቢዮ ፍርድ ቤቱ በአሜሪካ እና በእስራኤል ባለስልጣናት ላይ የሚያደርገውን ምርመራ በመቃወም ተቋሙን እንደሚያፈራርሱ ካስጠነቀቁ በኋላ ነው። ኦማር አሜሪካ በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የሰብአዊ መብትን ለማስከበር በምትኩ ፍርድ ቤቱን ከመቃወም በአርአያነት መሪ መሆን እንዳለባት ተናግረዋል።
oromo: Miseensi Mana Maree Bakka Buutotaa Ameerikaa Ilhaan Oomar, Ameerikaan Mana Murtii Yakkaalee Addunyaa (ICC) akka makamtu gaafatte. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe erga Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Maarkoo Ruubiyoon, mana murtichi qorannoo qondaaltota Ameerikaa fi Israa'el irratti gaggeessuun isaa mormuun dhaabbaticha akka diigan dhaadatanii booda dha. Oomar akka jedhanti, Ameerikaan mirga namoomaa fi seera kabachiisuun biyyoota kaaniif fakkeenya ta'uu qabdi malee, mana murticha irratti duuluu hin qabdu.

title: Grand Mosque of Paris celebrates 100-year anniversary
english: The Grand Mosque of Paris is marking its 100th anniversary since opening. It was originally established to honor Muslim soldiers who sacrificed their lives during World War I. Today, the mosque stands as both a significant symbol of the Islamic faith in France and a center for ongoing political debate.
amharic: የፓሪስ ታላቁ መስጊድ ከተከፈተበት ጊዜ ጀምሮ 100ኛ ዓመቱን እያከበረ ነው። መስጊዱ የተገነባው በአንደኛው የዓለም ጦርነት ወቅት ለሞቱት ሙስሊም ወታደሮች መታሰቢያ እንዲሆን ነው። በአሁኑ ጊዜ መስጊዱ በፈረንሳይ የእስልምና እምነት ዋና ምልክት ከመሆኑም በላይ ለተለያዩ የፖለቲካ ውይይቶች መነሻ ሆኗል።
oromo: Masjiidni Guddaan Paaris erga baname waggaa 100 guutee jira. Masjiidichi kan ijaarame waraana addunyaa tokkoffaa irratti loltoota Muslimaatiif yaadannoo akka ta'uuf ture. Yeroo ammaatti masjiidichi mallattoo amantii Islaamaa biyya Faransaay keessatti bakka guddaa qabu yoo ta'u, gama biraatiin immoo falmii siyaasaa hedduuf bakka xiyyeeffannoo ta'ee jira.

title: FIFA to probe Argentina’s Falklands banner display at World Cup semifinal
english: FIFA is investigating Argentina's football team after players displayed a political banner claiming sovereignty over the Falkland Islands following their World Cup semifinal win against England. The act violated tournament rules prohibiting political messages in stadiums, leading British officials to demand an official review. FIFA's disciplinary committee will now review the case to determine if fines or other penalties are necessary for the team or the involved players.
amharic: ፊፋ የአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ ቡድን ከእንግሊዝ ጋር ባደረጉት የአለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በኋላ የፎክላንድ ደሴቶችን የይገባኛል ጥያቄ የሚያነሳ ፖለቲካዊ ሰንደቅ አላማ በማሳየታቸው ምርመራ መጀመሩን አስታውቋል። በስታዲየም ውስጥ ፖለቲካዊ መልዕክቶችን ማስተላለፍ የተከለከለ በመሆኑ፣ ይህ ድርጊት የውድድሩን ህግጋት የሚጥስ ነው። የፊፋ ዲሲፕሊን ኮሚቴ በጉዳዩ ላይ በመወያየት ቡድኑ ወይም ተጫዋቾቹ ላይ ቅጣት መጣል አለመጣሉን ይወስናል።
oromo: FIFA gareen kubba miilaa Arjantiinaa injifannoo waldorgommii semifaayinalii Ingiliz irratti erga argatanii booda, duwwaa lafa Folkaandi irratti gaaffii siyaasaa kaasuun alaabaa agarsiisuun isaanii irratti qorannoo eegaleera. Gochi kun seera istaadiyoomii keessatti ergaa siyaasaa dabarsuu dhoorku cabsuu waan ta'eef, mootummaan Biriiteen tarkaanfii akka fudhatamu gaafateera. Koreen disiplinii FIFAa qorannoo kana erga xumuree booda, garee ykn taphattoota irratti adabbii irratti murteessa.

title: Strait of Hormuz won’t return to pre-war status, Iran says
english: A spokesperson for the Iranian military has declared that the Strait of Hormuz will not return to its pre-war conditions. Iran claims that the United States is intentionally undermining regional security and fears Iran's authority over this vital waterway. Furthermore, Tehran has warned neighboring Gulf nations against permitting the U.S. to launch attacks from their territories.
amharic: የኢራን ወታደራዊ ቃል አቀባይ እንደገለፁት የሆርሙዝ ስትሬት ወደ ቀድሞ ሁኔታው እንደማይመለስ አስታውቀዋል። ኢራን አሜሪካ በክልሉ አለመረጋጋትን እየፈጠረች ነው ስትል ትከሳለች። በተጨማሪም ቴህራን ጎረቤት የባህረ ሰላጤ ሀገራት አሜሪካ በእነሱ ግዛት ተጠቅማ ጥቃት እንዳትፈጽም አስጠንቅቃለች።
oromo: Dubbi himaan waraana Iraan akka jedhutti, iddoon Hormuz jedhamu gara haala isaa kan duriitti akka hin deebine ibseera. Iraan, Ameerikaan nagaa naannichaa booressaa jirti jechuun himatti. Kana malees, Tehraan biyyoota naannoo Gulf jiran, Ameerikaan lafa isaanii fayyadamtee akka isaan hin weerarre akeekkachiisteetti.

title: US mounts sixth straight night of attacks as Iran warns of wider war
english: For the sixth night in a row, the United States has launched military strikes against Iranian infrastructure, including airports, bridges, and communications towers. These attacks follow a collapse in a recent peace agreement, with both nations trading accusations of violating the deal. In response, Iran has carried out retaliatory strikes against U.S.-linked facilities in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan, warning that the conflict could escalate further if the U.S. continues its operations.
amharic: አሜሪካ በተከታታይ ለስድስተኛ ቀን በኢራን መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ የአየር ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች። ጥቃቱ ኤርፖርቶችን፣ ድልድዮችን እና የቴሌኮም ግንብ መገናኛዎችን ያነጣጠረ ነው። በቅርቡ የተደረሰው ስምምነት በመፈራረሱ ምክንያት ሁለቱ አገራት እርስ በርስ በመወነጃጀል ላይ ናቸው። ኢራን በምላሹ በባህሬን፣ በኩዌት እና በዮርዳኖስ የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ጦር ጣቢያዎችን ያጠቃች ሲሆን፣ ጥቃቱ ከቀጠለ ጦርነቱ ወደ ሌሎች አካባቢዎች እንደሚሰፋ አስጠንቅቃለች።
oromo: Ameerikaan guyyaa ja'affaaf walitti aansee bu'uuraalee misoomaa Iraan irratti miidhaa qaqqabsiisuu itti fufteetti; kunis buufata xiyyaaraa, darajaawwan fi giddu gala quunnamtii kan dabalatuudha. Walii galtee nageenyaa darbe irratti rakkoo uumameen wal-qabatee, biyyoonni lameen wal himachaa jiru. Iraanis deebii kenniteen buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa kan Bahrain, Kuweet fi Jordaan irratti haleellaa raawwatteetti; akkasumas haleellaan kun yoo itti fufe waraanni gara naannoo biroottis akka babal'atu akeekkachiisteetti.

title: Donald Trump live: US president to deliver primetime address on elections
english: US President Donald Trump is scheduled to give a live primetime speech this Thursday at 9pm Eastern Time. While specific details remain limited, the President promised to share significant information regarding election security. Many observers are concerned that the address might be used to question the reliability of the electoral process ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.
amharic: የአሜሪካው ፕሬዚዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በዚህ ሐሙስ ምሽት በፕራይም ታይም ፕሮግራም ላይ ንግግር እንደሚያደርጉ አስታውቀዋል። ፕሬዚዳንቱ ንግግራቸው ስለ ምርጫ ደህንነት ትልቅ መረጃ የያዘ እንደሚሆን ቢገልጹም ዝርዝር ጉዳዮችን ግን አልጠቀሱም። ብዙዎች ንግግሩ ከ2026ቱ የመሃል ምርጫ በፊት የምርጫ ሂደቱን ታማኝነት ጥያቄ ውስጥ ሊከት ይችላል የሚል ስጋት አላቸው።
oromo: Pireezidaantiin Yunaayitid Isteetis Doonaald Tiraamp guyyaa Kamisaa galgala sa'aatii 9:00 irratti haasaa bilisaan dhiyeessuuf qophaa'aniiru. Pireezidaantichi haasaan isaanii waa'ee nageenya filannoo irratti odeeffannoo barbaachisaa kan of keessaa qabu ta'uu dubbatanis, ibsa bal'aa hin kennine. Namoonni hedduun haasaan kun filannoo giddu-galeessa waggaa 2026 dura amanamummaa adeemsa filannoo irratti shakkii uumuu danda'a jedhanii sodaatu.

title: The hardest party to manage in the Iran talks isn’t Iran
english: The United States is currently facing significant difficulties managing its relationship with Israel during sensitive negotiations with Iran. Washington reportedly warned Iran of a potential Israeli plot to assassinate key Iranian negotiators, fearing that Israel is attempting to sabotage diplomatic efforts. This situation highlights a complex challenge where the U.S. struggles more to control the actions of its own ally than those of its traditional adversary.
amharic: አሜሪካ ከኢራን ጋር በምታደርገው ስሱ የዲፕሎማሲ ድርድር ወቅት ከእስራኤል ጋር ባላት ግንኙነት ትልቅ ፈተና ተጋርጦባታል። ዋሽንግተን የኢራን ዋና ተደራዳሪዎችን ለመግደል ታቅዶ የነበረውን የእስራኤል ሴራ በመስጋት ለኢራን አስጠንቅቃለች። ይህም አሜሪካ ከጠላቷ ይልቅ የቅርብ አጋሯን እንቅስቃሴ ለመቆጣጠር የበለጠ እየተቸገረች መሆኑን ያሳያል።
oromo: Amerikaa marii dippilomaasii kan Iiraan waliin godhamaa jiru keessatti hariiroo isheen Israa'el waliin qabduun rakkina guddaa keessa galtee jirti. Waashingitan marii kana fashaleessuuf Israa'el hogganoota marii Iiraan ajjeesuuf karoora qabdi jedhee waan shakkeef, Iiraaniif akeekkachiisa dabarsiteerti. Haalli kun akka agarsiisutti, Amerikaan diina ishee caalaa michuu ishee taate Israa'eliin to'achuuf akka itti ulfaataa jirtuudha.

title: Palestinians injured in Israeli settler attacks across West Bank
english: Multiple Palestinians were wounded in recent attacks by Israeli settlers and soldiers throughout the occupied West Bank. During these incidents, individuals were assaulted, shot, or had their property stolen, while over 30 people were taken into custody during military raids. These acts of violence continue to rise, with reports indicating a significant increase in settler attacks on Palestinian families and their land since late 2023.
amharic: በተያዘው የዌስት ባንክ አካባቢ በእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎችና ወታደሮች በተፈጸሙ ጥቃቶች በርካታ ፍልስጤማውያን ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። በእነዚህ ግጭቶች ወቅት ሰዎች ድብደባና የተኩስ ጥቃት የደረሰባቸው ሲሆን የንብረት ዘረፋም ተፈጽሟል። በተጨማሪም በወታደራዊ ወረራዎች ከ30 በላይ ሰዎች ታስረዋል። ከ2023 መጨረሻ ወዲህ በእስራኤል ሰፋሪዎች የሚፈጸሙ የጥቃት ድርጊቶች በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ መጨመራቸው ተነግሯል።
oromo: Naannoo qabamee jiru kan West Bank keessatti weerartoonni Israa'el fi waraanni isaanii walitti aansuudhaan miidhaa geessisaniin Palastaayiniin hedduun miidhamaniiru. Gandoota kana keessatti namoonni reebamuufi rasaasaan rukutamuu akkasumas qabeenyi isaanii hatamuu gabaafameera; kanaan walqabatisee waraanni namoota 30 ol ta'an hidhaatti guureera. Hagayya 2023 irraa kaasee gochi weerartootaa fi haleellaan maatiiwwan Palastaayinii irratti raawwatamu sadarkaa olaanaatti dabaluun isaa ibsameera.

title: Syria says it foiled Hezbollah weapons shipment
english: Syrian authorities announced that they successfully blocked an attempt to smuggle weapons, including missiles and drones, across the border from Iraq. Officials claim these military supplies were intended for Hezbollah in Lebanon. Hezbollah has officially denied having any operations or presence within Syrian territory.
amharic: የሶሪያ ባለስልጣናት ከኢራቅ ድንበር በኩል ወደ ሊባኖስ ለሂዝቦላህ ሊገቡ የነበሩ ሚሳኤሎችን እና ድሮኖችን የያዘ የጦር መሳሪያ ጭነት በቁጥጥር ስር ማዋላቸውን አስታውቀዋል። የሶሪያ መንግስት ይህንን ህገ-ወጥ የጦር መሳሪያ ዝውውር እንዳከሸፈ ገልጿል። በበኩሉ ሂዝቦላህ በሶሪያ ውስጥ ምንም አይነት እንቅስቃሴ እንደሌለው በይፋ አስተባብሏል።
oromo: Mootummaan Suuriyaa hidhannoo, kanneen akka misaa'elaa fi droonii gara Liibaanoositti gara Hizboolaahiitti ergamaa turan daangaa Iraaq irraa qabachuu isaa beeksisuu isaa gabaasichi ibsa. Angawoonni Suuriyaa yaalii seeraan alaa kana akka fashaleessan dubbataniiru. Hizboolaahiin gama isaatiin, biyya Suuriyaa keessa sochii tokkollee akka hin qabne haaleera.

title: ‘Series of explosions in Kuwait’, report says
english: Multiple explosions have been reported across Kuwait according to information cited by an Iranian news agency. The impact of these blasts was significant enough to be audible in the nearby city of Basra, Iraq. Authorities are currently monitoring the situation following these initial reports.
amharic: የኢራን የዜና ወኪል እንደዘገበው በኩዌት ውስጥ ተከታታይ ፍንዳታዎች ተከስተዋል። የእነዚህ ፍንዳታዎች ድምፅ በአጎራባችዋ የኢራቅ ከተማ በባስራ ጭምር ይሰማ እንደነበር ተገልጿል። የጉዳዩን ሁኔታ በተመለከተ ተጨማሪ መረጃዎች እየተጠበቁ ነው።
oromo: gabaasa miidiyaa Iraan akka ibsetti, biyya Kuweyt keessatti dhoohawwan walitti aansuun mudataniiru. Dhoohawwan kunneen sagaleen isaanii magaalaa Basraa kan biyya Iraaq hanga jedhamtutti dhaga'ameera. Haala dhimma kanaa irratti hordofsi gochuu fi qulqulleessuun itti fufee jira.

title: Saudi Arabia mulls military escalation in response to Houthi threats
english: Saudi Arabia is considering potential military action against Houthi forces as tensions rise and a long-standing ceasefire becomes increasingly fragile. The shift follows a controversial flight to Sanaa carrying military experts and Houthi officials, which led to a retaliatory missile attack on the Saudi city of Abha. While Saudi leadership remains divided on the risks of renewed conflict, experts warn that any escalation could severely disrupt global energy supplies and worsen Yemen's humanitarian crisis.
amharic: የሳውዲ አረቢያ መንግስት ከሁቲ ታጣቂዎች ጋር ያለው የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት በመሻከሩ ምክንያት በአማፂያኑ ላይ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ ለመውሰድ እያሰበ ነው። ውጥረቱ የጦፈው ወታደራዊ ባለሙያዎችን የጫነ በረራ ወደ ሰንዓ ማቅናቱን ተከትሎ ሁቲዎች በሳውዲ አረቢያ ከተማ በአብሃ ላይ የሚሳኤል ጥቃት በመሰንዘራቸው ነው። የሳውዲ ባለስልጣናት በጉዳዩ ላይ የተከፋፈሉ ቢሆንም፣ የጦርነቱ መመለስ በየመን ያለውን ሰብዓዊ ቀውስ ከማባባሱም በላይ በአለም አቀፍ የነዳጅ አቅርቦት ላይ ከፍተኛ ስጋት እንደሚፈጥር ባለሙያዎች አስጠንቅቀዋል።
oromo: Mootummaan Saudii Arabiyaa walitti bu’iinsa humnoota Hutiin waliin tureefi xiqqaachaa dhufuu dhuka dhaabuu wajjiin walqabatee tarkaanfii waraanaa fudhachuuf mari'achaa jira. Kuni kan ta’e xiyyaaraan hayyama malee gara Sana’aatti balali’ee ogeeyyii waraanaa geessisuu hordofee, Hutiin magaalaa Abhaa irratti weerara misayilaa raawwatanii booda. Hogganoonni Saudii tarkaanfii akkasii fudhachuu irratti yaada adda addaa kan qaban yoo ta’u, ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, waraanni deebi’ee yoo jalqabe rakkoo namoomaa Yaman keessatti jiru hammeessuu malee gabaa boba’aa addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa hamaa geessisuu danda’a.

title: Iran state media reports new strikes, explosions in south
english: Iranian state media reported a series of explosions and military strikes across southern Iran on Thursday night. The incidents occurred in areas including Bushehr, which hosts a nuclear facility, as well as Bandar Abbas and Ahvaz. Officials in Tehran have characterized these strikes as a continuation of American aggression.
amharic: የኢራን የመንግስት መገናኛ ብዙኃን በሐሙስ ምሽት በደቡባዊ የሀገሪቱ ክፍሎች ፍንዳታዎች እና የአየር ድብደባዎች መፈጸማቸውን ዘግበዋል። ጥቃቶቹ የኒውክሌር ኃይል ማመንጫ በሚገኝበት ቡሼርን ጨምሮ በባንዳር አባስ እና በአህዋዝ ከተሞች አካባቢ ተከስተዋል። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት ድርጊቱን የአሜሪካ ጥቃት መቀጠል እንደሆነ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Miidiyaaleen mootummaa Iraan akka gabaasanitti, halkan kamisaa gama kibba biyyattii keessatti dhohiinsaafi haleellaan qilleensaa raawwatameera. Haleellaan kun bakka buufata niwukilaraa jiru kan Bushehr, akkasumas magaala Bandar Abbas fi Ahwaaz keessatti kan mudateedha. Hojjettoonni mootummaa Iraan haleellaa kana kan Ameerikaan raawwatte jechuun himatu.

title: John Esposito, would-be Catholic priest turned renowned scholar of Islam, dies aged 86
english: John Esposito, a celebrated Georgetown University scholar who initially trained to be a Catholic priest, has passed away at the age of 86. Throughout his career, he wrote over 50 books aimed at debunking common Western stereotypes about Islam and promoting better understanding between religions. He was widely respected for his commitment to human rights and his efforts to challenge the mistreatment of Muslim communities globally.
amharic: በጆርጅታውን ዩኒቨርሲቲ የኢስላማዊ ጥናት ምሁር የነበሩት እና በመጀመሪያ የካቶሊክ ካህን ለመሆን ሰልጥነው የነበሩት ጆን ኤስፖዚቶ በ86 ዓመታቸው ከዚህ ዓለም በሞት ተለይተዋል። በሙያ ዘመናቸው ስለ እስልምና ሃይማኖት የተሳሳቱ የምዕራባውያን አመለካከቶችን ለመቅረፍ እና በሃይማኖቶች መካከል መግባባትን ለመፍጠር ከ50 በላይ መጻሕፍትን ጽፈዋል። ለሰብአዊ መብቶች በመቆም እና በአለም ዙሪያ ያሉ ሙስሊም ማህበረሰቦች የሚደርስባቸውን ኢ-ፍትሃዊ አያያዝ በመቃወም ይታወቁ ነበር።
oromo: Pirofesarri beekamaa Yuunivarsiitii Joorjiitaawunii fi kanaan dura lubaa Kaatolikii ta'uuf barataa ture Joohn Espositoo umurii waggaa 86tti du'aan addunyaa kanarraa boqoteera. Inni jireenya isaa guutuu kitaabota 50 ol barreessuudhaan waa'ee Islaamummaa irratti ilaalcha dogoggoraa lixaa fi hawaasa gidduutti jiru fooyyessuuf carraaqeera. Mirga namoomaaf falmuu fi hawaasa Muslimaa addunyaa irratti miidhaman hubannoo dhugaa irratti hundaa'ee deeggaruudhaan kan beekamuudha.
